• AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate
• Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
• Certified Scrum Master (CSM)
• AWS Security Fundamentals


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE:

Senior Python Full Stack Engineer
March 2024 – Present
Project Overview

Designed and developed a high-performance trading analytics platform supporting equity and derivatives trading desks. The system processes over 8 million transactions daily and performs real-time portfolio risk calculations, regulatory compliance validation, and fraud detection scoring.
The platform was built using microservices architecture deployed on AWS EKS with event-driven messaging using Kafka.




flipkart– Senior Python Engineer (2023 – 2024)

Designed and developed Python-based microservices using FastAPI, Flask, and Django for healthcare claims and eligibility systems.
Implemented RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints for secure data exchange.
Built Kafka-based event-driven systems to process high-volume healthcare transactions.
Developed asynchronous services using Celery and RabbitMQ.
Optimized Oracle and PostgreSQL queries and indexing strategies.
Built CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Docker, and Kubernetes.
Implemented OAuth2.0 and JWT-based security using Spring Security and Python frameworks.
Integrated Redis caching for performance improvement.
Used Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK stack for monitoring and logging.
Led Agile sprint activities and code reviews.

AT&T – Senior Python Engineer (2020 – 2023 )

Developed scalable backend services using Python and Java for telecom billing systems.
Created REST APIs using Django REST Framework and Flask.
Built Kafka pipelines for telecom event processing.
Implemented RabbitMQ for asynchronous messaging.
Deployed containerized applications to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).
Automated CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions.
Built Swagger/OpenAPI documentation.
Implemented role-based access control using OAuth2.0.
Developed batch processing pipelines in Python.


WALMART GLOBAL TECH – Python Engineer (2017 – 2020 )

Built Python microservices for inventory and pricing systems.
Implemented Redis caching to reduce database load.
Built ETL pipelines for sales analytics.
Developed Kafka consumers for real-time sales processing.
Optimized PostgreSQL and MySQL queries.
Built Jenkins pipelines for CI/CD automation.



INFOSYS – Python Developer (2014 – 2017 | Hyderabad, India)

Developed enterprise banking applications using Python and Java.
Created RESTful APIs using Flask and Django.
Implemented IBM MQ and RabbitMQ messaging.
Built batch processing scripts using Python.
Designed Oracle and MySQL schemas.


Key Responsibilities:
• Architected scalable backend microservices using FastAPI and Django REST Framework to handle real-time market data ingestion and trade execution processing.
• Designed asynchronous event-driven workflows using Apache Kafka for decoupled communication between trading, risk, and compliance services.
• Built high-performance RESTful APIs consumed by internal trading dashboards and external regulatory systems.
• Implemented distributed caching layer using Redis to reduce API response time from 450ms to under 120ms.
• Developed complex financial calculation engines for Value at Risk (VaR), margin exposure, and liquidity risk analysis using Python and NumPy.
• Created dynamic React-based dashboards for traders to visualize P&L, portfolio exposure, and compliance alerts in real time.
• Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based access control aligned with internal compliance requirements.
• Led database optimization efforts including indexing strategies and partitioning in PostgreSQL for time-series trade data.
• Containerized applications using Docker and deployed to Kubernetes clusters with Helm charts.
• Designed CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions to automate build, test, and deployment workflows.
• Integrated monitoring and alerting using Prometheus and Grafana to proactively identify production bottlenecks.
• Participated in architecture design reviews with enterprise solution architects and cybersecurity teams.
• Led code reviews and mentored junior developers on best practices for scalable financial systems.
• Worked closely with DevOps teams to ensure blue-green deployment strategies with zero downtime releases.
• Implemented audit logging and transaction traceability mechanisms to comply with SOX regulations.

Environment:
Python 3.10, FastAPI, Django, React 18, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, AWS EKS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Jenkins, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack.

Bachelor of Technology – Computer Science
BVRIT,Hyderabad, India

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY:
•	Processed and transformed large-scale data using Snowflake, SnowSQL, and Snowpipe, implementing ETL workflows through dbt, Matillion, and Talend to ensure clean, consistent data pipelines feeding Data Marts and Snowflake schema for analytics and reporting across multiple cloud and on-premise environments.
•	Executed batch and streaming pipelines using Python, PySpark, Pandas, NumPy, and Apache Spark, integrating real-time ingestion from Apache Kafka and Apache Pulsar to deliver high-quality, timely operational and business datasets to downstream teams and visualization tools.
•	Orchestrated workflow scheduling and pipeline automation using Airflow, Luigi, and Prefect, coordinating incremental updates through Snowflake Tasks and Snowflake Streams while maintaining job reliability, retry mechanisms, and monitoring to reduce processing latency across analytics pipelines.
•	Built cloud-based data integration using AWS S3, AWS Redshift, AWS Glue, AWS Lambda, AWS EC2, Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse, Azure Blob Storage, GCP Cloud Storage, GCP BigQuery, and GCP Dataflow, ensuring seamless ingestion, transformation, and storage of structured and semi-structured logistics and business data.
•	Designed interactive dashboards and data visualizations using React.js, Redux, Zustand, Plotly, Chart.js, D3.js, and Axios, delivering operational, financial, and predictive insights while connecting with backend APIs and FastAPI or Flask services.
•	Managed data quality, lineage, and governance using Collibra, Alation, Apache Atlas, Erwin, and Power Designer, documenting Dimensional Modeling, Star schema, and Snowflake schema structures for audit compliance and ensuring accurate analytics across multiple datasets and Data Marts.
•	Monitored pipelines and infrastructure performance using Datadog, CloudWatch, New Relic, and Azure Monitor, implementing alerting and reporting mechanisms to track latency, job failures, and resource usage for operational reliability in cloud and on-prem environments.
•	Developed, cleaned, and transformed datasets using Python, PySpark, Pandas, and NumPy, preparing training and operational data for scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and MLflow, while enabling robust machine learning experimentation and predictive modeling.
•	Automated code integration, deployment, and testing using Git, GitHub, GitHub Actions, GitLab, GitLab CI/CD, and Jenkins, maintaining version-controlled dbt models, ETL scripts, and API workflows for repeatable and consistent deployments across environments.
•	Optimized SQL and SnowSQL queries, performing complex joins, aggregations, and window functions to generate analytics-ready datasets, improving processing efficiency and reducing latency for real-time reporting and business intelligence dashboards.
•	Designed reusable APIs using FastAPI, Flask, and Fetch API, integrating processed datasets into interactive dashboards and analytics tools to provide end-users with up-to-date metrics and actionable insights in logistics, finance, and operations teams.
•	Coordinated project and team collaboration using Jira, Trello, Slack, Zoom, and Confluence, managing task assignments, documentation, and cross-functional communications to ensure timely delivery of ETL workflows, models, and analytics outputs for operational and strategic decisions.
•	Maintained and provisioned infrastructure using Terraform and CloudFormation, deploying pipelines, cloud storage, and compute resources efficiently while following reproducible, version-controlled practices to support scalable data operations and analytics platforms.
•	Implemented Snowflake Cortex AI to enrich datasets with intelligent insights and predictive outputs, integrating with Snowflake schema, Data Marts, and dbt models to enhance analytics capabilities and decision-making for operations and business teams.
•	Standardized Dimensional Modeling and Star schema designs for multiple datasets, creating structured Data Marts for logistics, customer, and operational data to ensure consistency and support advanced analytics, reporting, and predictive modeling initiatives.
•	Collaborated across cloud platforms including AWS, Azure, and GCP, combining tools such as AWS Redshift, Azure Synapse, and GCP BigQuery to deliver harmonized data pipelines, ensuring secure, reliable, and timely availability of enterprise datasets.
•	Integrated real-time and batch workflows using Apache Kafka, Apache Pulsar, Snowflake Tasks, Snowflake Streams, and dbt, enabling operational teams to access updated metrics, KPIs, and predictive analytics for business decisions in logistics, finance, and operations.
•	Designed machine learning experiments using scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and MLflow, processing cleaned datasets from Python, PySpark, and Snowflake, enabling predictive models and AI-driven insights for operational optimization and customer analytics.

Responsibilities:
•	Designed and implemented end-to-end ETL pipelines using Python, PySpark, and Apache Spark, ingesting large-scale data from AWS S3 into Snowflake. Optimized transformations with Pandas and NumPy to enable efficient data processing and reporting.
•	Managed real-time data streaming workflows by integrating Apache Kafka and Apache Pulsar with Snowflake Streams and Snowpipe, ensuring continuous data ingestion into Snowflake and supporting timely analytics for business-critical dashboards.
•	Developed and deployed automated ELT processes using dbt and Matillion, performing transformations within Snowflake, while maintaining consistent schema structures such as Star schema and Data Marts for analytical consumption.
•	Tuned Snowflake performance by optimizing clustering keys, partitioning strategies, and caching, while using SnowSQL to execute high-performance queries and monitor workloads, improving query response time and reducing compute costs.
•	Built machine learning pipelines with scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, orchestrating experiments via MLflow, and deployed predictive models integrated with Snowflake Cortex AI for enterprise-wide AI-enabled insights.
•	Automated workflow orchestration using Airflow and Jenkins, scheduling ETL/ELT jobs from AWS Glue and AWS Lambda, ensuring fault-tolerant execution and maintaining data integrity across cloud environments.
•	Designed and implemented secure data architectures using Terraform, AWS IAM, and Snowflake role-based access control, while monitoring system performance with Datadog and CloudWatch to ensure compliance and operational stability.
•	Modeled enterprise data structures through Dimensional Modeling using Erwin, defining Star schema and Data Marts, enabling seamless integration with Snowflake for analytics and BI reporting.
•	Developed interactive dashboards using React.js, Redux, Zustand, and Plotly, fetching data through Axios APIs from backend services deployed on Flask, providing users with responsive, data-driven front-end applications.
•	Implemented CI/CD pipelines for data engineering workflows using Git and Jenkins, automating version control, code validation, and deployment of dbt models and Python scripts across cloud environments.
•	Orchestrated cloud-based data ingestion from AWS S3 to AWS Redshift and Snowflake using AWS Glue, performing schema transformations and data quality checks to maintain high-quality enterprise datasets.
•	Monitored and optimized pipeline performance by leveraging Datadog and CloudWatch to track metrics, detect anomalies, and tune Apache Spark jobs and Snowflake queries for improved throughput and reliability.
•	Integrated AI/ML predictions into enterprise workflows via Snowflake Cortex AI, Python, and MLflow, ensuring that processed datasets in Snowflake were ready for downstream analytics and reporting in dashboards.
•	Developed and maintained complex PySpark and Python scripts for batch and streaming ETL jobs, combining Pandas and NumPy for preprocessing, and loaded processed datasets into Snowflake for analytical use.
•	Collaborated with cross-functional teams using Jira and Slack to define requirements, design pipelines, and deliver production-ready Snowflake solutions, ensuring alignment with business objectives and compliance policies.
•	Implemented data governance and lineage tracking using Collibra and Informatica, maintaining metadata, validating transformations, and enforcing enterprise-wide standards for security, compliance, and quality.
•	Created reusable ELT templates in dbt and Matillion, standardized Data Marts, and applied Dimensional Modeling principles to support scalable analytics and reduce development cycle times.
•	Orchestrated event-driven processing using Snowflake Tasks, Snowflake Streams, and Apache Kafka, ensuring real-time updates were reflected across AWS environments, while maintaining fault tolerance and end-to-end data reliability.

Environment: Python, PySpark, Apache Spark, AWS S3, Snowflake, Pandas, NumPy, Apache Kafka, Apache Pulsar, Snowflake Streams, Snowpipe, dbt, Matillion, Star schema, Data Marts, SnowSQL, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, MLflow, Snowflake Cortex AI, Airflow, Jenkins, AWS Glue, AWS Lambda, Terraform, AWS IAM, Datadog, CloudWatch, Dimensional Modeling, Erwin, React.js, Redux, Zustand, Plotly, Axios, Flask, Git, AWS Redshift, Jira, Slack, Collibra, Informatica, Snowflake Tasks



Client: Delta Airlines                                                                                                                                      Location: Atlanta, GA
Role: SR DATA ENGINEER                                                                                                           December 2019 – September 2022

Responsibilities:
•	Designed and implemented scalable ETL pipelines using Snowflake, Snowpipe, SnowSQL, and Fivetran, automating real-time ingestion of flight and operational data. Optimized loading processes for minimal latency while ensuring data integrity and consistency across multiple Snowflake schemas.
•	Developed modular transformation workflows with dbt, leveraging Snowflake Tasks and Streams to orchestrate incremental data updates. Implemented version-controlled transformations and integrated with GitHub and GitHub Actions for CI/CD deployment of production-ready pipelines.
•	Engineered high-performance batch and streaming data pipelines using Python, PySpark, Pandas, NumPy, and Apache Spark, enabling large-scale processing of flight telemetry and booking data while maintaining efficient memory and compute resource utilization.
•	Built real-time event processing solutions using Apache Kafka and Apache Pulsar, ensuring reliable ingestion of aircraft telemetry, passenger updates, and operational logs. Coordinated with Prefect to schedule, monitor, and retry failed pipelines automatically.
•	Designed and maintained data integration workflows with Azure Data Factory, orchestrating data movement from Azure Blob Storage to Azure Synapse and Snowflake, ensuring near real-time availability for analytics and reporting across multiple aviation business units.
•	Implemented robust monitoring and observability using New Relic and Azure Monitor, tracking pipeline health, latency, and error rates. Automated alerts for failed ETL jobs and performance degradation, enabling proactive resolution of data workflow issues.
•	Developed dimensional models and data marts using Dimensional Modeling principles and Snowflake schema structures, providing consolidated flight operations, ticketing, and customer analytics datasets for downstream reporting tools.
•	Designed RESTful APIs using FastAPI to serve processed flight and operational datasets to internal applications. Integrated API endpoints with React.js, Redux, and Zustand front-end dashboards, enabling interactive visualizations and real-time metrics.
•	Developed dynamic dashboards and interactive charts using Chart.js and Axios, consuming processed datasets from Snowflake and APIs, enabling operations teams to track airline performance, flight delays, and passenger load factors efficiently.
•	Performed advanced SQL development and query optimization using SQL and SnowSQL, creating complex joins, aggregations, and window functions to deliver business-ready datasets for reporting and analytics.
•	Leveraged ER/Studio and Alation to document data lineage, metadata, and relationships across multiple Snowflake databases, ensuring compliance with governance standards and enabling accurate audit trails for aviation data.
•	Automated CI/CD pipelines for ETL, dbt models, and API deployments using GitHub Actions, integrating testing, linting, and version control practices. Ensured seamless promotion of code from development to production environments.
•	Developed reusable Python and PySpark libraries for data cleansing, enrichment, and transformation, standardizing workflows across flight operations, customer service, and cargo datasets, improving consistency and maintainability.
•	Collaborated with cross-functional teams on real-time data strategies, implementing Prefect orchestrations for scheduled and event-driven tasks. Ensured timely data delivery to analytics platforms and operational dashboards.
•	Utilized Terraform to provision cloud infrastructure, including Azure Synapse and Azure Blob Storage, following infrastructure-as-code principles. Automated environment setups and maintained reproducible, version-controlled deployments.
•	Optimized streaming and batch pipelines to handle airline operational spikes using Apache Spark, Kafka, and Pulsar, reducing processing latency and improving system reliability during peak travel periods.
•	Developed and maintained dbt models for multiple Data Marts, integrating historical and streaming data to support predictive analytics for flight schedules, revenue management, and passenger behavior analysis.
•	Engaged in collaborative documentation and knowledge sharing via Confluence and Teams, maintaining process guides, workflow diagrams, and ETL runbooks to enable operational continuity and cross-team alignment in data engineering projects.
Environment: Snowflake, Snowpipe, SnowSQL, Fivetran, dbt, Snowflake Tasks, Snowflake Streams, GitHub, GitHub Actions, Python, PySpark, Pandas, NumPy, Apache Spark, Apache Kafka, Apache Pulsar, Prefect, Azure Data Factory, Azure Blob Storage, Azure Synapse, New Relic, Azure Monitor, Dimensional Modeling, FastAPI, React.js, Redux, Zustand, Chart.js, Axios, SQL, ER/Studio, Alation, Terraform, Confluence, Teams, Data Marts, Snowflake schema

Client: UPS                                                                                                                                                  Location: Atlanta, GA  
Role: DATA ENGINEER / DATA  ANALYST                                                                              February 2017 – November 2019

Responsibilities:
•	Designed and implemented scalable ETL pipelines using Snowflake, SnowSQL, Snowpipe, and Talend, automating ingestion of shipment and logistics data. Optimized loading processes for minimal latency while ensuring data consistency across multiple Snowflake schemas and Data Marts.
•	Developed modular data transformation workflows with dbt, leveraging Snowflake Tasks and Streams for incremental updates. Integrated version-controlled transformations using GitLab and automated deployment via GitLab CI/CD for seamless production rollout.
•	Engineered batch and streaming data pipelines using Python, PySpark, Pandas, NumPy, and Apache Spark, enabling large-scale processing of operational and shipment tracking data while maintaining optimal memory and compute efficiency.
•	Built real-time event-driven data workflows with Apache Kafka, Apache Pulsar, and Luigi, ensuring reliable ingestion of logistics events. Scheduled and monitored pipelines for failures and retries, improving data freshness for reporting teams.
•	Orchestrated cloud-based data integration using GCP Dataflow and GCP Cloud Storage, transferring processed datasets to GCP BigQuery for analytics. Automated workflows ensured near real-time availability of operational insights across logistics business units.
•	Implemented monitoring and observability for pipelines using Dynatrace and Stackdriver, tracking job health, latency, and error rates. Automated alerts reduced downtime and improved incident response efficiency for ETL workflows.
•	Designed dimensional models and Data Marts using Dimensional Modeling principles and Snowflake schema, consolidating shipping, inventory, and delivery data for downstream analytics and reporting dashboards.
•	Developed RESTful APIs with Fetch API and backend processing in Python, serving operational and tracking data to internal dashboards. Integrated front-end visualizations using React.js, Redux, Zustand, and D3.js for interactive reporting.
•	Built dynamic visual dashboards using D3.js and Fetch API, consuming transformed datasets from Snowflake and GCP BigQuery, enabling operations teams to monitor delivery performance and shipment delays in real time.
•	Performed advanced data modeling and query optimization using SQL and SnowSQL, creating complex joins, aggregations, and window functions to deliver analytics-ready datasets for logistics and inventory teams.
•	Leveraged Power Designer and Apache Atlas to document data lineage, relationships, and metadata across Snowflake databases, ensuring governance compliance and maintaining accurate audit trails for logistics operations.
•	Automated CI/CD pipelines for dbt models, ETL workflows, and API deployments using GitLab CI/CD, integrating testing, linting, and version control to ensure seamless promotion from development to production environments.
•	Developed reusable Python and PySpark scripts for data cleansing, enrichment, and transformation across logistics, inventory, and shipment datasets, standardizing workflows and improving maintainability and accuracy.
•	Collaborated with cross-functional teams using Trello and Zoom, coordinating real-time data strategy, scheduling, and task management to ensure timely delivery of analytics insights for operational decision-making.
•	Managed cloud infrastructure provisioning and reproducibility using Terraform, automating deployments of GCP Cloud Storage buckets, Dataflow jobs, and BigQuery datasets to support robust, scalable analytics pipelines.
Environment: Snowflake, SnowSQL, Snowpipe, Talend, dbt, Snowflake Tasks, Snowflake Streams, GitLab, GitLab CI/CD, Python, PySpark, Pandas, NumPy, Apache Spark, Apache Kafka, Apache Pulsar, Luigi, GCP Dataflow, GCP Cloud Storage, GCP BigQuery, Dynatrace, Stackdriver, Dimensional Modeling, Snowflake schema, Data Marts, Fetch API, React.js, Redux, Zustand, D3.js, SQL, Power Designer, Apache Atlas, Terraform, Trello, Zoom

Client: ADP                                                                                                                                                       Location: Roseland, NJ
Role: DATA ENGINEER / MIGRATION SPECIALIST                                                                    January 2016 – January 2017

Responsibilities:
•	Developed comprehensive Payroll Data Integration platform using Azure Cloud, improving data flow between time-tracking, benefits, and payroll processing modules while streamlining employee information management across multiple HR systems.
•	Created data ingestion pipelines using Talend ETL and Azure Data Factory to process employee data from various corporate clients, implementing validation rules that ensured payroll accuracy for thousands of employees.
•	Executed data migration projects transferring employee records from legacy payroll systems to modern cloud-based platforms, preserving historical payroll information while enabling new functionality through comprehensive data mapping.
•	Built complex workflows with Apache Airflow to coordinate ETL processes across distributed payroll systems, orchestrating time-sensitive operations including pre-payroll validation and post-processing tax calculations.
•	Implemented Azure SQL Database for structured employee records and Azure Data Lake Storage for semi-structured HR documents, reducing processing response times by 40% through strategic indexing and query optimization.
•	Established data security protocols meeting SOX compliance and regulatory requirements for sensitive payroll data, implementing encryption, access controls, and audit logging to protect personally identifiable information.
•	Created predictive models using Azure Databricks, improving workforce planning accuracy through machine learning techniques applied to historical employment data for optimized resource allocation.
•	Built interactive Tableau dashboards visualizing payroll metrics and labor cost analytics, providing actionable insights into compensation trends and identifying cost-saving opportunities across departments.
•	Developed custom APIs using .NET Core for secure data exchange between payroll systems and third-party benefits providers, enabling real-time updates while maintaining strict data security protocols.
•	Created automated tax filing and reporting systems with data quality monitoring frameworks, ensuring timely submission of payroll tax documents while validating calculations against latest regulatory requirements.

Environment: Azure Cloud, Talend ETL, Azure Data Factory (ADF), Azure Databricks, Azure Data Lake Storage, Tableau, Epic

Client: Inno Minds                                                                                                                                              Location: Pune, India
Role: ETL DEVELOPER                                                                                                                          May 2014 – November 2015

Responsibilities:
•	Developed scalable ETL pipeline using Oracle Data Integrator (ODI) and SQL Server Integration Services (SSIS), integrating data from client's legacy systems and third-party applications while maintaining consistent processing times during peak retail seasons.
•	Set up SQL Server data warehouse with partitioning strategies and incremental loading techniques for secure management of raw, staging, and transformed retail transaction data, reducing processing windows for nightly batch operations.
•	Used Microsoft SQL Server Integration Services to extract data from Oracle, DB2, and MySQL databases, implementing change data capture mechanisms that minimized system impact on production databases during business hours.
•	Created SSIS packages processing XML and Excel file formats from point-of-sale systems, incorporating error handling routines and logging frameworks that improved troubleshooting capabilities while reducing data processing time by 40%.
•	Built detailed data transformations with Oracle Data Integrator, focusing on product hierarchy normalization and customer data cleansing, standardizing product classifications across multiple retail brands and eliminating duplicate customer records.
•	Set up Microsoft SQL Server Analysis Services for multidimensional data modeling with optimized aggregation designs, improving query performance for common retail KPI calculations and reducing report generation time by 30%.
•	Developed stored procedures and SQL scripts to move transformed data into the enterprise data warehouse, implementing efficient bulk loading techniques while maintaining referential integrity across fact and dimension tables.
•	Created automated ETL job scheduling systems using SQL Server Agent and Windows Task Scheduler, implementing dependency management and notification systems that ensured proper execution sequence while reducing manual intervention by 65%.
•	Tracked ETL job performance through custom monitoring dashboards with alert systems for processing failures, providing real-time visibility into processing bottlenecks and reducing data availability issues by 45%.
•	Built Microsoft Power BI connection to the SQL Server data warehouse, creating interactive dashboards enabling real-time analysis of store performance and inventory metrics that provided actionable insights for store managers.

Environment: AWS, Informatica, Talend, AWS S3, AWS Glue, AWS Redshift, Tableau, AWS Lambda

Bachelor of Technology (BTech) | Computer Science | Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham | Kerala,India | August 2010 - March 2014

text:
Raghu Aadekay
araghuramm9@gmail.com |9015305307 | https://www.linkedin.com/in/raghu-aadekay-88b692335/

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

•	Over 11 years of diverse IT experience as a Java Full Stack Developer, proficient in Software Process Engineering, adept at designing and building Web Applications using Java/J2EE and open-source technologies
•	Developed enterprise web applications using Java across multiple projects, implementing complex functionalities that reduced system processing time while maintaining robust application security and scalability for high-traffic environments with thousands of concurrent users.
•	Designed database architectures supporting mission-critical applications, writing advanced SQL queries and stored procedures that improved data retrieval efficiency while ensuring seamless integration with Java persistence layers across distributed systems.
•	Created responsive user interfaces utilizing JavaScript frameworks for enterprise-level applications, implementing custom solutions that enhanced user experience through dynamic content loading while ensuring cross-browser compatibility and accessibility standards.
•	Developed modular CSS styling systems for large-scale web applications, implementing responsive designs that maintained consistent branding across multiple device types while reducing code redundancy and improving maintenance efficiency.
•	Built modern responsive interfaces using Bootstrap component libraries for enterprise applications, customizing frameworks to create intuitive user experiences while maintaining accessibility standards and ensuring consistent rendering across all major browsers.
•	Implemented data persistence layers using JPA for complex enterprise applications, designing efficient entity relationships and optimizing query performance while ensuring proper transaction management and data integrity across distributed microservices.
•	Engineered web services and RESTful APIs using Java and Spring framework that processed millions of requests daily, implementing comprehensive error handling while ensuring secure authentication protocols and maintaining detailed API documentation.
•	Constructed complex database schemas and wrote optimized SQL queries supporting multi-tenant architectures, designing efficient indexing strategies and implementing advanced procedures that supported complex reporting requirements while maintaining sub-second query performance.
•	Utilized Eclipse IDE for full-stack development across multiple enterprise projects, customizing workspaces with specialized plugins that enhanced team productivity while establishing standardized code formatting and quality control processes.
•	Developed interactive web components using jQuery for enterprise applications, creating custom plugins that simplified complex DOM manipulations while ensuring optimal performance and compatibility across various browser environments.
•	Configured and deployed web applications on Apache Tomcat servers across environments, implementing custom configurations that optimized memory usage and connection pooling while ensuring high availability through clustering.
•	Created comprehensive test suites using JUnit and Selenium for automated testing of web applications, designing test cases that achieved comprehensive code coverage while implementing continuous integration pipelines that enforced quality standards.
•	Implemented CI/CD pipelines using AWS cloud services including CodeCommit, CodeBuild, and CodeDeploy, configuring infrastructure as code that automated deployment processes while ensuring consistent environment configurations across development stages.
•	Managed project requirements and sprint planning through Jira and Confluence, creating detailed workflows that improved team velocity while maintaining comprehensive technical documentation that facilitated knowledge sharing across development teams.
•	Analyzed complex business requirements to determine appropriate technology solutions, translating stakeholder needs into technical specifications while ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture standards and identifying potential integration challenges.
•	Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design and implement web services that met specific business requirements, facilitating technical discussions between development and business stakeholders while ensuring solutions met performance and security standards.
•	Investigated operational issues through detailed system analysis and troubleshooting, identifying root causes of production problems while implementing permanent fixes that prevented recurrence and documenting solutions for future reference.
•	Communicated technical concepts effectively to non-technical users and stakeholders, creating clear documentation and presentations that translated complex systems into understandable terms while gathering valuable feedback for continuous improvement.

TECHNICAL SKILLS

•	Programming Languages:  C, C++, Java 11, SQL, PL/SQL, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, GoLang
•	Java/J2EE Technologies: Servlets, Spring, JSP, JSTL, JDBC, RMI, EJB, JFC/Swing, AWT, Applets, Multi-threading, Java Networking
•	Frameworks: Spring, Hibernate, Angular JS, Spring Security, Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA, Spring Cloud (Netflix, Gateway), NgRx, Redux-Saga, Grunt
•	Web Technologies: JSP, JavaScript, jQuery, AJAX, Angular JS, Angular 2+, XML, HTML5, CSS3, ReactJS, BackBone.JS, Node JS, Express JS, Redux, Tailwind CSS, Webpack, Babel
•	Relational Database: Oracle 11g/12C, SQL server 2012/2014/2016, MySQL, PostgreSQL
•	NoSQL Databases: MongoDB, Cassandra, DynamoDB, Redis
•	Web Services: SOAP 1.2, REST 2.0, JAX-WS, JAX-RPC, JAX-RS, Swagger, RESTful, GraphQL
•	Application/Web Servers: Apache Tomcat 8.0, Oracle/BEA WebLogic, Apache CXF, IBM WebSphere
•	Messaging:  RabbitMQ, IBM MQ, Apache Kafka
•	IDEs: Eclipse, IntelliJ 2017.1, Spring Tool Suite (STS) 3.9.3, Atom, PyCharm, Visual Studio
•	Cloud Environments: Azure, AWS, GCP, Netflix Eureka, Kubernetes, Elastic Beanstalk, Docker, OpenShift, MLops (MLairflow, DVC), RedHat, OpenShift
•	Methodologies: Agile (Safe 6.x), waterfall, TDD (Test-Driven-Development), Scrum
•	Testing technologies/tools: JUnit, Postman, TestNG, Mockito, Cucumber, JMeter, RFT, React Testing Library, Cypress, Jasmine, Karma, LEX
•	Version Control: Git, Bitbucket, SVN, Rational ClearCase, 
•	Build Tools: Maven 3.3.9, Gradle 3.4.1, Ant 1.10, Jenkins
•	Platforms: Windows 10, UNIX, Linux
•	Security Technologies: OAuth2, JWT, Spring Security, HTTPS, TLS, AES
•	Performance and Monitoring Tools: Prometheus, Grafana, AWS CloudWatch, JVisualVM, Log4J, Logstash, Elasticsearch, Kibana, JIRA

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Client:  Home Depot 								                    Atlanta, GA   
Sr. Full Stack Java Developer									    Oct 2021 – Present

•	Developed secure patient data management system using Java and Spring Boot, creating RESTful microservices that integrated with legacy healthcare systems while ensuring HIPAA compliance through custom annotations for data validation and sanitization.
•	Built comprehensive healthcare provider portal utilizing Spring MVC and Hibernate for seamless data persistence, enabling medical professionals to access patient records securely while implementing advanced caching strategies that reduced database load during peak hours.
•	Created real-time patient monitoring dashboards with JavaScript and Bootstrap, designing responsive interfaces that displayed critical patient vitals and medication schedules with custom components specifically designed for healthcare workflows.
•	Implemented continuous integration and deployment pipelines using AWS CodeBuild, AWS CodeDeploy, and Jenkins, enabling rapid delivery of healthcare application updates while configuring automated security scans and compliance checks before production deployment.
•	Maintained RESTful APIs with Swagger documentation for interoperability between different healthcare systems, facilitating seamless data exchange between departments while implementing versioning strategies to ensure backward compatibility.
•	Executed comprehensive testing strategies using JUnit and Selenium, achieving over 90% code coverage for critical healthcare applications while designing custom extensions to simulate healthcare-specific scenarios for robust workflow validation.
•	Optimized SQL queries and designed stored procedures in Oracle databases to enhance performance of patient record retrieval and medical billing processes using advanced tuning techniques for high-volume healthcare transactions.
•	Deployed containerized microservices using Docker and Kubernetes for scalable healthcare applications, ensuring high availability during peak hospital hours while configuring health checks to monitor service dependencies.
•	Integrated OAuth authentication framework with AWS IAM to secure protected health information across multiple applications, implementing custom policies to enforce least privilege access controls for different healthcare professional roles.
•	Configured logging and monitoring solutions using ELK Stack and AWS CloudWatch to track system performance and detect potential security breaches, setting up custom alarms for critical healthcare metrics and compliance issues.
•	Utilized DynamoDB and Amazon S3 to build scalable medical imaging storage solution that supported quick retrieval of patient diagnostic images while implementing versioning to maintain complete history of medical records.
•	Developed medication inventory management system using Spring Data JPA and PostgreSQL, creating efficient data models for tracking pharmaceutical supplies across multiple hospital locations with optimized repository methods.
•	Implemented comprehensive logging with Log4j and Logback for audit trails of all PHI access, ensuring compliance with healthcare regulations while creating custom appenders to format logs specifically for compliance audits.
•	Managed version control using Git and AWS CodeCommit for healthcare application codebases, implementing branch protection rules and code review processes while establishing workflows aligned with healthcare software development requirements.
•	Integrated Postman and SonarQube into development workflow to ensure API testing coverage and code quality standards, creating automated test collections that validated healthcare-specific data formats and regulatory compliance requirements.
•	Designed distributed caching solutions using Redis for healthcare applications, implementing cache invalidation strategies that maintained data consistency while significantly reducing database load for frequently accessed patient information.
•	Configured Apache Tomcat servers for healthcare web applications, optimizing JVM settings and connection pools to handle peak traffic during hospital shift changes while ensuring proper session management for secure user access.
•	Implemented Microservices architecture for healthcare systems, designing service boundaries around medical domains while creating resilient communication patterns between services using circuit breakers and retry mechanisms.
•	Developed data migration strategies for legacy healthcare systems, creating ETL processes that preserved data integrity while transforming medical records to conform with modern healthcare data standards.
•	Implemented SOAP web services for integration with external healthcare providers, creating secure message exchanges that maintained patient data confidentiality while ensuring reliable delivery of critical medical information.
•	Created comprehensive API Gateway solutions using AWS API Gateway for healthcare microservices, implementing request throttling and authentication mechanisms while providing unified access points for mobile and web applications.
•	Developed batch processing systems for healthcare claims using Spring Batch, implementing job partitioning strategies that optimized processing of large medical datasets while maintaining detailed execution logs for audit purposes.
Environment: Amazon EKS, AWS Codedeploy, Amazon S3, AWS Codebuild, AWS IAM, AWS SNS, Kubernetes, DynamoDB, AWS EC2, AWS Cloud, Docker, AWS CloudWatch, Apache Tomcat, Oracle, pgAdmin, AWS Codecommit, Java 11, ELK Stack, git, Jenkins, Maven, SonarQube, DBeaver, Logback, Log4j, JUnit, JUnit 5, Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, JPA, JavaScript (ES6+), JQuery, HTML5, CSS3, SQL, JSON, Swagger, Selenium, Postman, RESTful APIs, Bootstrap 5, Eclipse IDE.

Client: Bank of America   		                                                             Charlotte, NC     
Sr. Full Stack Java Developer 								             Oct 2018 – Sep 2021 

•	Designed and implemented a comprehensive financial transaction processing system using Java and Spring Boot, which handled thousands of daily transactions for institutional clients while optimizing performance through effective memory management and concurrent processing techniques.
•	Developed secure RESTful APIs for integration with third-party financial data providers using JWT authentication and AWS KMS for encryption key management, documenting them with OpenAPI specifications for seamless integration with front-end applications.
•	Created responsive user interfaces for financial portfolio management dashboards using JavaScript, Bootstrap, and jQuery, implementing advanced data visualization components that displayed real-time market data and portfolio performance metrics for investment advisors.
•	Built and maintained a robust CI/CD pipeline using AWS CodeCommit, AWS CodeBuild, and GitHub Actions, which automated testing, security scanning, and deployment processes while incorporating Checkstyle for code quality enforcement.
•	Engineered a high-availability database architecture using AWS RDS with PostgreSQL for storing sensitive financial data, optimizing query performance through indexing strategies and query refactoring to reduce report generation time for financial statements.
•	Implemented comprehensive security protocols for financial data protection using AWS KMS encryption and token-based authentication, ensuring compliance with financial industry regulations while enhancing protocols with role-based access control systems.
•	Designed and deployed microservices using Kubernetes and AWS ECS to handle different aspects of the financial platform including portfolio management, risk assessment, and trade execution with auto-scaling capabilities for varying workloads.
•	Developed automated testing frameworks using Selenium and JUnit that validated critical financial calculations and user workflows, including end-to-end validation of trade execution processes and regulatory compliance checks for various financial products.
•	Created a comprehensive monitoring solution using Prometheus and Grafana dashboards that tracked system performance, API response times, and transaction success rates while implementing custom alerts for critical financial operations.
•	Utilized AWS Lambda functions for event-driven processing of financial data streams, including real-time market data ingestion and portfolio rebalancing calculations while optimizing execution environments for high-volume transaction processing within strict timing requirements.
•	Implemented data migration strategies for legacy financial systems using SQL scripts and batch processing tools, creating complex stored procedures that automated daily reconciliation processes between trading systems and accounting platforms.
•	Integrated third-party financial services using XML data exchange formats and RESTful APIs, enabling features like real-time market data feeds and payment processing while developing custom parsers for various financial document formats.
•	Maintained and enhanced financial reporting systems using Spring Boot and JPA for data access, optimizing entity mappings and query strategies to improve the performance of complex financial calculations and report generation processes.
•	Configured and managed cloud infrastructure using AWS CDK and AWS Elastic Beanstalk for deploying financial applications, implementing infrastructure-as-code practices to ensure consistent deployment environments across development, testing, and production systems.
•	Developed real-time transaction monitoring systems using AWS Cloud services and Amazon ECS for container orchestration, implementing distributed tracing with AWS X-Ray to identify performance bottlenecks in financial transaction pipelines.
•	Created investment portfolio analysis tools using MySQL Workbench for database modeling and SQL Developer for query optimization, processing historical financial data for thousands of investment instruments while calculating risk metrics and expected returns.
•	Engineered regulatory compliance reporting systems with Gradle build automation and JUnit for verification, deploying applications on Apache TomEE servers while implementing automated test suites to verify calculation accuracy for financial risk assessments.
•	Constructed secure document management systems for financial contracts using AWS Cloud infrastructure with containerization for isolated processing environments, implementing workflow automation that significantly reduced manual processing time.
•	Built customer onboarding workflows for investment accounts with document verification and compliance checks, implementing front-end components with responsive design techniques while ensuring consistent user interface elements across the application.
•	Developed real-time market data dashboards for trading desks using jQuery for dynamic content updates, deploying solutions using containerized services on Amazon ECS for horizontal scaling during high market volatility periods.
Environment: AWS Lambda, Apache TomEE, AWS CDK, AWS Elastic Beanstalk, podman, AWS X-Ray, AWS cloud, AWS KMS, AWS Codebuild, AWS ECS, GitHub Actions, git, Kubernetes, AWS RDS, Grafana, PostgreSQL, Gradle, AWS Codecommit, Amazon ECS, Prometheus, Eclipse IDE, Spring Boot, JUnit, JUnit 4, RESTful APIs, OpenAPI, JPA, SQL, SQL Developer, MySQL Workbench, Selenium, Checkstyle, SLF4J.


Client: Costcoo                                                                                    Issaquah, WA 
Sr. Java Developer									           Feb 2016 – Sep 2018

•	esigned and implemented a comprehensive payroll calculation engine using Java streams and lambda expressions that processed over 10,000 employee records daily, reducing calculation time by 40% while ensuring accurate tax calculations and compliance with federal regulations.
•	Developed a secure employee self-service portal using Spring Boot microservices architecture with RESTful APIs for seamless integration with third-party benefit providers, implementing OAuth authentication through AWS Cognito and Keycloak for robust security.
•	Created and optimized complex SQL queries for payroll data extraction and reporting, implementing stored procedures in MySQL that handled time-sensitive payroll processing requirements while utilizing advanced join operations and indexing strategies.
•	Built responsive front-end interfaces using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS with Bootstrap for cross-browser compatibility, creating interactive dashboards for payroll administrators to monitor processing status in real-time through advanced DOM manipulation techniques.
•	Established a CI/CD pipeline using AWS CodeCommit, AWS CodeBuild, and AWS CodeDeploy for automated testing and deployment, implementing rigorous code quality checks using PMD and SonarQube to enforce standards and identify security vulnerabilities.
•	Configured and managed containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes on Amazon EKS, ensuring high availability and scalability during peak payroll processing periods while implementing resource limits to prevent contention during high-traffic periods.
•	Integrated third-party tax calculation services through JPA and Hibernate for accurate tax withholding calculations across multiple jurisdictions, implementing complex entity relationships and custom query methods to handle hierarchical tax jurisdictions and employee exemptions.
•	Engineered comprehensive test suites using JUnit and Mockito achieving over 85% code coverage, while implementing Selenium WebDriver for end-to-end testing of critical payroll workflows and creating parameterized tests for various calculation scenarios.
•	Monitored application performance and errors using AWS CloudWatch and Splunk, creating custom dashboards and alerts to proactively identify issues before they impacted payroll processing while implementing detailed logging with contextual information.
•	Improved legacy payroll batch processing system by migrating from Ant build scripts to modern build tools, utilizing custom task extensions to create validation steps ensuring data integrity during payroll processing and reporting workflows.
•	Optimized database performance by migrating payroll data storage to AWS Aurora, resulting in faster query processing for large-scale payroll calculations while configuring clusters to handle peak processing periods with automatic scaling capabilities.
•	Built containerized microservices architecture for payroll processing using AWS Fargate and Amazon EKS, configuring tasks to scale during high-demand periods and automatically reduce resources during off-peak times.
•	Developed asynchronous processing system for large payroll batches using AWS SQS to handle peak processing periods, implementing dead-letter queues to capture and retry failed payroll transactions with proper error handling and notification.
•	Implemented RESTful API services using Spring Boot and deployed them on Apache Tomcat servers, configuring connection pools and resource allocation to handle concurrent requests during high-volume payroll processing periods.
•	Migrated legacy payroll system to cloud-native architecture on AWS Cloud, resulting in significant reduction in processing time while utilizing multiple services to create a scalable solution that automatically adjusted resources based on demands.
•	Created custom reporting engine using CSS and HTML to generate professional payroll documents and tax forms, implementing responsive design principles ensuring reports displayed correctly across different devices used by administrators.
•	Configured high-availability deployment architecture using Apache Tomcat clusters behind load balancers, implementing session replication across instances to maintain user state during failover scenarios and ensure uninterrupted payroll services.
•	Designed comprehensive audit logging system for tracking all payroll transactions and changes, storing data in AWS Cloud compliant storage with retention policies while implementing encrypted transmission and storage according to industry regulations.

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY (VERY LONG)

Principal React / Frontend Engineer with 20+ years of experience building large-scale web applications, enterprise portals, SaaS platforms, and consumer products. Expert in React ecosystem, JavaScript frameworks, UI architecture, performance optimization, accessibility, and design systems. Proven leader in driving frontend modernization, migrating legacy systems to React, and delivering high-traffic, high-availability applications used by millions of users globally.
Extensive experience across Banking, Healthcare, Insurance, Telecom, Retail, E-Commerce, and SaaS domains. Strong background in full-stack collaboration, cloud platforms, DevOps pipelines, security best practices, and modern frontend engineering principles.

LEAD DATA ENGINEER
+1(737)291-4865 | anandh.s.engineer@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/anandh-s-leadengineer


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

9+ years of experience as a Lead Data Engineer specializing in building and
optimizing large-scale data platforms across healthcare, insurance, banking,
and e-commerce domains. Proficient in designing distributed data pipelines
using Apache Spark, Scala, and Python on AWS and GCP environments. Deep
expertise in real-time data streaming with Kafka and Kinesis for event-driven
architectures. Hands-on experience with data lakehouse patterns using Apache
Iceberg and Delta Lake. Strong background in data governance, lineage tracking,
and metadata management using Apache Atlas and Collibra.


CORE COMPETENCIES

Data Pipeline Design         Cloud Data Platforms          Real-Time Streaming
ETL / ELT Development        Data Lakehouse Architecture   Data Governance
Distributed Computing        Performance Tuning            Team Leadership
CI/CD Automation             Data Quality Frameworks       MDM and Metadata Mgmt

Languages          Python, Scala, Java, SQL, R, Shell Scripting, PySpark
Big Data           Apache Spark, Kafka, Kinesis, HDFS, Hive, Flink, NiFi
ETL Tools          AWS Glue, Informatica, Apache Hop, DataStage, Iceberg

dbt Analytics Engineering Certification            dbt Labs              2023


WORK EXPERIENCE


HCA HEALTHCARE   Nashville, TN                             Oct 2022 - Present
Lead Data Engineer

Spearheaded design and delivery of a cloud-native data lakehouse on AWS using
Apache Iceberg and S3, consolidating clinical and administrative data from 15+
hospital systems into a unified analytics platform serving 200+ business users.

Led a team of 6 data engineers, conducting code reviews, sprint planning, and
technical mentorship while aligning pipeline development with HIPAA compliance
and HL7 data standards.

Architected real-time streaming pipelines using Kafka and AWS Kinesis to ingest
EHR events and claims data with sub-second latency into Redshift and S3 zones.

Built automated data quality checks using Great Expectations and dbt, reducing
data quality incidents by 55% across patient and claims data domains.

Environments: Apache Iceberg, AWS S3, Apache Kafka, AWS Kinesis, Amazon Redshift,
Great Expectations, dbt, AWS Glue, Python, Scala


TRANSUNION   Chicago, IL                                   Jun 2020 - Sep 2022
Senior Data Engineer

Designed and maintained credit risk data pipelines using Apache Spark and AWS
Glue, processing 5TB+ of daily consumer credit records for downstream scoring
and reporting applications.

Migrated legacy on-premise Oracle-based ETL workflows to cloud-native pipelines
on AWS, reducing processing cost by 40% and improving data freshness by 3x.

Implemented Apache Atlas for metadata management and data lineage tracking
across all credit data pipelines, enabling full traceability from source to report.

Developed reusable PySpark transformation libraries adopted by 4 engineering
teams, standardizing data processing patterns across the analytics organization.

Environments: Apache Spark, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Apache Atlas, PySpark,
Oracle, AWS S3, AWS CloudWatch, Python


ANTHEM BLUE CROSS   Atlanta, GA                            Jan 2018 - May 2020
Data Engineer

Built end-to-end ETL pipelines using DataStage and Python to integrate claims,
member, and provider data from multiple source systems into a central data
warehouse for actuarial and operational analytics.

Designed GCP-based data processing workflows using BigQuery and Dataflow to
replace legacy batch jobs, cutting overnight processing windows from 6 hours
to under 90 minutes.

Implemented Kafka-based event streaming for real-time eligibility updates,
enabling downstream applications to consume member changes within seconds.

Environments: IBM DataStage, GCP BigQuery, Google Dataflow, Apache Kafka,
Python, PostgreSQL, Cloud Composer


INFOSYS   Pune, India                                      Aug 2016 - Dec 2017
Data Engineer

Developed ETL workflows using Informatica PowerCenter and SQL for retail and
banking clients, integrating data from ERP systems and flat files into Teradata
data warehouses for business reporting.

Automated job scheduling and dependency management using Apache NiFi, improving
pipeline reliability and reducing manual interventions by 65%.

Environments: Informatica PowerCenter, Teradata, Apache NiFi, SQL Server,
Oracle DB, Python


HEXAWARE TECHNOLOGIES   Chennai, India                     May 2014 - Jul 2016
Junior Data Engineer

Built SQL-based data transformation scripts and SSIS packages for insurance

Assisted in designing dimensional models including star and snowflake schemas
for financial reporting and claims analytics dashboards.

Environments: SSIS, SQL Server, Oracle DB, Teradata, MySQL

text:
VARUN KRISHNA
Senior Big Data Engineer & Cloud Data Architect
Hyderabad, TS • +91 98765 43210 • varun.krishna.data@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/varun-krishna-bigdata • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Results-driven Senior Big Data Engineer with 10+ years of experience designing
and delivering large-scale data platforms across healthcare, banking, telecom,
and e-commerce industries. Expert in building end-to-end cloud data pipelines
using Azure Databricks, AWS Glue, and GCP BigQuery. Distinguished for
architecting a Unified Data Lake at NovaMed Health Systems that consolidated
9 legacy pipelines into a single Azure-based platform, reducing data latency by
72% and saving $4.1M in annual infrastructure costs. Proven track record of
managing enterprise-grade ETL workflows processing 5TB+ daily across
multi-cloud environments with 99.9% SLA compliance.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: Cloud Architecture Design, Data Platform Strategy,
  Cross-Functional Team Collaboration, Stakeholder Reporting, Agile Delivery.

• Data Pipeline & Engineering: Batch & Real-Time Ingestion, Delta Lake,
  CDC Pipelines, ETL/ELT Design, Data Lakehouse Architecture.

• Total Cloud & Infrastructure: Multi-Cloud Strategy (AWS/Azure/GCP),
  Cost Optimization, Auto-Scaling, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).

• HR Technology & Analytics: HRIS Data Integration, People Analytics
  Pipelines, Payroll Data Migration, Workforce Reporting Dashboards.

• Data Quality & Governance: Data Lineage, Master Data Management (MDM),
  Data Cataloging, Quality Frameworks, Policy Enforcement.

• Compliance & Risk Management: HIPAA, GDPR, SOX, CCPA, PCI-DSS
  Compliance, Internal Audits, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).

• Learning & Development: Mentoring Junior Engineers, Technical Knowledge
  Transfer, Internal Bootcamps, Documentation Best Practices.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

Big Data & Processing Ecosystems
• Distributed Computing: Apache Spark, PySpark, Apache Kafka, Apache Flink,
  Apache Beam, Hive, HDFS, NiFi, Airflow, Apache Ranger.
• ETL & Integration: AWS Glue, Azure Data Factory, Informatica PowerCenter,
  Talend, Delta Lake, CDC, AppFlow, WebMethods.

Cloud Platforms
• AWS: EMR, S3, Glue, Redshift, Lambda, Kinesis, Step Functions, CloudWatch.
• Azure: Databricks, Data Factory, Synapse Analytics, Logic Apps, Monitor, RBAC.
• GCP: BigQuery, Dataflow, Pub/Sub, DataProc, Bigtable, Cloud Composer.

Data & Analytics
• Databases: MS SQL Server, Oracle 11g, MySQL, Cassandra, MongoDB, Teradata.
• BI & Reporting: Tableau, Power BI, Looker, Splunk, Google Data Studio, OBIEE.
• DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, GitLab CI/CD.
• Languages: Python, PySpark, Scala, Java, SQL, T-SQL, Spring Boot.


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Big Data Engineer | NovaMed Health Systems | 2022 – Present
Hyderabad, TS (Integrated Healthcare Network | 8,000 Employees)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed as the lead data engineer
to modernize the enterprise data platform for a multi-hospital healthcare network.
Responsible for architecting HIPAA-compliant cloud pipelines and leading a 6-member
data engineering pod.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Unified Data Lake Architecture: Designed and deployed a consolidated Azure
  Data Lake, migrating 9 legacy on-prem pipelines. Reduced data latency by 72%
  and cut infrastructure licensing costs by $4.1M annually.
• Real-Time Clinical Data Pipelines: Built Kafka-based streaming pipelines to
  ingest real-time HL7/FHIR data from 12 hospital sources into Azure Databricks,
  enabling same-day clinical reporting for 3,000+ clinicians.
• ML Pipeline Enablement: Integrated Azure Machine Learning with the data
  platform to power predictive readmission models. Improved model refresh
  cadence from monthly to daily.
• CI/CD Automation: Implemented Azure DevOps pipelines for automated testing
  and deployment of all data engineering artifacts, reducing release cycles from
  3 weeks to 4 days.
• Compliance & Governance: Built end-to-end data lineage and RBAC controls
  across all datasets to maintain 100% HIPAA and GDPR compliance.


Data Engineer | HDFC Bank | 2019 – 2022
Mumbai, MH (Leading Private Sector Bank | Financial Services)

Operational Leadership: Served as the primary data engineer for risk and
compliance analytics, managing critical batch and real-time pipelines supporting
fraud detection and regulatory reporting.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Fraud Detection Pipeline: Designed a real-time Spark Streaming pipeline on
  AWS EMR processing 2M+ daily transactions for anomaly detection. Reduced
  fraud detection lag from 6 hours to under 8 minutes.
• Cloud Data Warehouse Migration: Led the migration of 15TB of historical
  banking data from Teradata to Amazon Redshift, improving query performance
  by 60% and reducing warehousing costs by $1.8M per year.
• Regulatory Reporting Automation: Automated RBI compliance reports using
  AWS Glue and Step Functions, eliminating 120+ hours of manual effort monthly.
• Data Quality Framework: Implemented a Great Expectations-based data quality
  suite, reducing pipeline failures due to bad data by 80%.


Data Engineer | Wipro Technologies | 2016 – 2019
Bengaluru, KA (IT Services & Consulting)

Role Overview: Deployed as a client-facing data engineer across telecom and
retail accounts. Focused on building scalable ETL workflows and BI dashboards.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Telecom CDR Pipeline: Built an Apache Flink pipeline to process 500M+ call
  detail records (CDRs) daily for a Tier-1 telecom client, enabling real-time
  revenue assurance dashboards.
• Retail Analytics Platform: Designed a GCP BigQuery data warehouse integrating
  POS, CRM, and web clickstream data for a major e-commerce client, reducing
  report generation time from 8 hours to 20 minutes.
• Process Standardization: Created reusable PySpark pipeline templates across
  3 project teams, cutting new pipeline development time by 45%.


ETL Developer | Infosys BPM | 2014 – 2016
Hyderabad, TS (Business Process Management)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Legacy Migration: Built ETL pipelines using Informatica PowerCenter to migrate
  insurance claims data from Oracle to a cloud staging layer on Amazon S3,
  processing 50GB nightly batches with zero data loss.
• Dashboard Development: Designed Oracle BI and Tableau dashboards sourcing
  from Redshift data marts, improving operational reporting turnaround by 50%.
• Onboarding Automation: Automated client data onboarding workflows using
  Talend, reducing new client integration time from 3 weeks to 5 days.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project NovaPulse: Real-Time Healthcare Data Platform
Role: Lead Architect | Investment: ₹3.2 Cr | Duration: 18 Months
• Objective: Build a real-time, HIPAA-compliant data platform to unify clinical,
  operational, and financial data from 12 hospital sites.
• Strategy: Implemented a Lambda architecture using Kafka for streaming and
  Azure Data Factory for batch, with Delta Lake as the unified storage layer.
• Outcome: Delivered sub-10-minute data freshness for clinical dashboards.
  Reduced manual data reconciliation effort by 90%.

Project FinSight: Banking Analytics Modernization
Role: Technical Lead | Objective: Replace Teradata DW with a cloud-native stack.
• Strategy: Used AWS Glue for ETL, Redshift Spectrum for federated queries, and
  Tableau for BI layer. Implemented SCD Type 2 for all customer dimension tables.
• Outcome: Reduced infrastructure cost by 40%. Enabled self-service analytics
  for 200+ business users across risk, compliance, and marketing teams.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 8 junior data engineers; 3 have progressed to
  senior roles. Conduct bi-weekly technical sessions on Spark optimization and
  cloud cost management.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partnered with data scientists, DevOps, and
  business analysts across 3 time zones to deliver unified data products.
• Agile Delivery: Led sprint planning and backlog grooming for a 6-member pod
  using Jira; maintained consistent 90%+ sprint velocity over 18 months.
• Change Management: Drove adoption of new pipeline standards across 3 teams
  by developing internal documentation, runbooks, and hands-on workshops.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• Pipeline Monitoring Automation: Implemented Prometheus + Grafana alerting
  for 40+ production pipelines, reducing mean time to resolution (MTTR) by 65%.
• Auto-Scaling Clusters: Configured Databricks autoscaling policies reducing
  idle cluster compute costs by 38% without impacting SLA performance.
• Automated Data Validation: Built a PySpark-based data validation framework
  triggered post-ingestion, catching schema drift and null violations before they
  reach downstream consumers.
• Self-Service Onboarding: Designed a metadata-driven pipeline framework
  allowing analysts to onboard new data sources without engineering support,
  saving 12+ engineering hours per new source.


EDUCATION

Master of Technology in Computer Science & Data Engineering
Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Hyderabad, Hyderabad, TS

Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
Osmania University, Hyderabad, TS


CERTIFICATIONS

• Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP-203)
• AWS Certified: Big Data Specialty / Data Analytics Specialty
• Google Professional Data Engineer – Google Cloud
• Databricks Certified Associate Developer for Apache Spark
• Confluent Certified Developer for Apache Kafka
• Certified Data Management Professional (CDMP) – DAMA International

ARJUN REDDY KUMAR
Senior Data Engineer & AWS Cloud Specialist
Pune, MH • +91 91234 56780 • arjun.reddy.data@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/arjun-reddy-dataeng • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Results-driven Senior Data Engineer with 9+ years of experience designing
and delivering scalable data platforms across e-commerce, retail, and
logistics industries. Expert in building end-to-end cloud data pipelines
using AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, and Apache Spark. Distinguished for
architecting a Unified Commerce Data Platform at ShopNow Retail that
consolidated 11 fragmented data sources into a single AWS-based lakehouse,
reducing reporting latency by 68% and saving $3.6M in annual infrastructure
costs. Proven track record of managing high-volume ETL workflows processing
8TB+ daily across AWS and GCP environments with 99.8% SLA compliance.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: Cloud Data Architecture, Platform Roadmap Planning,
  Cross-Team Delivery, Executive Reporting, Agile & Scrum Delivery.

• Data Pipeline & Engineering: Batch & Streaming Ingestion, Data Lakehouse,
  ELT/ETL Design, Event-Driven Pipelines, Schema Registry Management.

• Total Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS-First Strategy, GCP Integration,
  Cost Governance, Spot Instance Optimization, Terraform IaC.

• Analytics & BI Enablement: Self-Service Analytics, KPI Dashboard Design,
  Data Mart Development, Ad-Hoc Query Optimization.

• Data Quality & Governance: Data Contracts, Schema Validation, MDM,
  Data Cataloging with AWS Glue Catalog, Row-Level Security.

• Compliance & Risk Management: PCI-DSS, GDPR, SOC 2, Data Masking,
  Encryption at Rest & Transit, IAM Policy Design.

• Learning & Development: Peer Mentoring, Code Review Culture,
  Internal Tech Talks, Confluence Documentation Standards.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

Big Data & Processing Ecosystems
• Distributed Computing: Apache Spark, PySpark, Apache Kafka, AWS Kinesis,
  Apache Airflow, AWS Step Functions, Apache Hudi, Delta Lake.
• ETL & Integration: AWS Glue, Fivetran, Stitch, dbt, Informatica,
  StreamSets, Change Data Capture (CDC), AppFlow.

Cloud Platforms
• AWS: S3, Glue, EMR, Redshift, Lambda, Kinesis, Athena, CloudWatch, IAM.
• GCP: BigQuery, Dataflow, Pub/Sub, Cloud Composer, DataProc, Looker.
• Azure: Data Factory, Synapse Analytics, Blob Storage, Azure Monitor.

Data & Analytics
• Databases: Amazon RDS, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle 12c, DynamoDB, MongoDB.
• BI & Reporting: Tableau, Looker, Power BI, AWS QuickSight, Metabase.
• DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, Terraform.
• Languages: Python, PySpark, SQL, Scala, Bash, dbt (SQL templating).


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Data Engineer | ShopNow Retail Ltd. | 2021 – Present
Pune, MH (Leading E-Commerce & Omnichannel Retailer | 6,500 Employees)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed as the lead data engineer
to build a modern cloud data platform supporting 50M+ monthly active users.
Responsible for designing AWS-native pipelines and leading a 5-member
data engineering squad.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Commerce Data Lakehouse: Designed and deployed a unified AWS lakehouse
  using S3, Glue, and Redshift Spectrum, consolidating 11 data sources.
  Reduced reporting latency by 68% and infrastructure costs by $3.6M annually.
• Real-Time Order Streaming: Built Kinesis-based streaming pipelines to process
  real-time order and inventory events, enabling sub-5-minute dashboard refresh
  for 500+ business users across merchandising and supply chain.
• dbt Transformation Layer: Implemented dbt for all warehouse transformations,
  introducing version-controlled, tested SQL models. Reduced data bugs by 74%.
• CI/CD for Data: Deployed GitHub Actions-based CI/CD for all pipeline code,
  reducing deployment time from 2 weeks to 1 day.
• Governance & Compliance: Implemented AWS Lake Formation for fine-grained
  access control and PCI-DSS compliant data masking across customer tables.


Data Engineer | Blue Dart Logistics | 2018 – 2021
Mumbai, MH (Express Logistics & Supply Chain | Financial Services)

Operational Leadership: Served as the core data engineer supporting route
optimization analytics and last-mile delivery performance reporting.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Route Analytics Pipeline: Built Spark-based batch pipelines on AWS EMR
  processing 1.5M+ daily shipment records for delivery SLA analysis. Improved
  on-time delivery reporting accuracy from 78% to 99%.
• Data Warehouse Modernization: Migrated legacy SQL Server DW to Amazon
  Redshift, cutting query execution time by 55% and storage costs by $1.2M/yr.
• GPS Event Streaming: Designed a Kafka pipeline to ingest real-time GPS
  telemetry from 8,000 delivery vehicles, enabling live fleet tracking dashboards.
• Automated Reporting: Replaced 40+ manual Excel reports with Tableau
  dashboards connected to Redshift, saving 80 analyst hours per week.


Data Engineer | Mphasis Ltd. | 2015 – 2018
Bengaluru, KA (IT Services & Digital Transformation)

Role Overview: Client-embedded data engineer across banking and insurance
accounts, focused on ETL modernization and cloud migration projects.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Insurance ETL Modernization: Migrated Informatica PowerCenter pipelines to
  AWS Glue for a US-based insurer, reducing batch processing time by 58%.
• Banking Reporting Platform: Built a star-schema Redshift DW for a mid-sized
  bank, enabling regulatory reporting 3x faster than the legacy Oracle solution.
• Process Standardization: Developed reusable Glue job templates adopted
  across 4 client projects, saving an estimated 200 development hours.


ETL Developer | Hexaware Technologies | 2014 – 2015
Chennai, TN (IT Services & BPO)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Claims Data Pipeline: Built Informatica-based ETL pipelines for a US health
  insurer, processing 30GB nightly claim files into a PostgreSQL staging layer.
• Dashboard Delivery: Designed Tableau dashboards sourcing from Redshift
  data marts, reducing claims reporting turnaround from 3 days to 4 hours.
• Client Onboarding: Automated data onboarding using shell scripts and
  Informatica workflows, cutting new client setup time from 2 weeks to 3 days.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Prism: Unified Commerce Data Lakehouse
Role: Lead Engineer | Investment: ₹2.8 Cr | Duration: 16 Months
• Objective: Consolidate 11 fragmented retail data sources into a governed
  AWS lakehouse for real-time and batch analytics.
• Strategy: Used S3 as the storage layer, AWS Glue for cataloging and ETL,
  Redshift Spectrum for federated queries, and dbt for transformation logic.
• Outcome: Enabled self-service analytics for 500+ users. Reduced data
  pipeline failures by 82% and saved $3.6M in annual infrastructure spend.

Project Falcon: Real-Time Fleet Intelligence
Role: Technical Lead | Objective: Build live fleet tracking and SLA monitoring.
• Strategy: Deployed Kafka for GPS event ingestion, Spark Streaming for
  aggregation, and Tableau for visualization with sub-minute refresh rates.
• Outcome: Reduced delivery SLA breach detection time from 4 hours to
  under 3 minutes. Improved fleet utilization score by 22%.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 6 junior engineers; 2 promoted to senior
  roles. Host weekly "Data Office Hours" for cross-team knowledge sharing.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Worked closely with product, analytics, and
  DevOps teams across 2 time zones to deliver shared data infrastructure.
• Agile Delivery: Ran sprint ceremonies for a 5-member squad using Jira;
  consistently achieved 88%+ sprint completion across 24 sprints.
• Change Management: Led migration of 3 teams from ad-hoc SQL scripts to
  dbt-managed models through workshops, templates, and pair programming.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• Pipeline Health Dashboard: Built a real-time Grafana + CloudWatch dashboard
  monitoring 55+ pipelines, reducing MTTR from 4 hours to 35 minutes.
• Cost Optimization Bot: Developed a Lambda function to auto-pause idle
  Redshift clusters, cutting monthly compute spend by 31%.
• Schema Drift Detection: Implemented automated schema validation using
  Great Expectations, catching breaking changes before they hit production.
• Self-Service Query Layer: Deployed AWS Athena with a curated Glue Catalog,
  enabling analysts to query raw S3 data without engineering support.


EDUCATION

Master of Science in Data Science & Engineering
Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Pune, MH

Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
Savitribai Phule Pune University, Pune, MH


CERTIFICATIONS

• AWS Certified Data Analytics – Specialty
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate
• Google Professional Data Engineer – Google Cloud
• Databricks Certified Associate Developer for Apache Spark
• dbt Certified Developer – dbt Labs
