PRIYA NAIR
Lead Data Scientist & ML Platform Engineer
Bengaluru, KA • +91 99876 54321 • priya.nair.ml@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/priya-nair-datascience • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Innovative Lead Data Scientist and ML Platform Engineer with 8+ years of
experience building production-grade machine learning systems and analytical
platforms across fintech, insurance, and digital media industries. Expert in
designing end-to-end ML pipelines using GCP Vertex AI, MLflow, and Apache
Spark. Distinguished for leading the ML Centralization Initiative at PaySmart
Fintech that unified 7 siloed model deployments into a single Vertex AI
platform, improving model accuracy by 31% and reducing inference latency by
55%. Proven track record of deploying 20+ production ML models serving
10M+ daily predictions with robust monitoring and retraining pipelines.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: ML Platform Strategy, Model Governance Roadmap,
  Research-to-Production Delivery, Stakeholder Alignment, OKR Setting.

• Machine Learning & AI: Supervised & Unsupervised Learning, NLP, Time
  Series Forecasting, Recommendation Systems, Anomaly Detection.

• Data Engineering & Pipelines: Feature Engineering, Data Wrangling,
  Batch & Real-Time Feature Stores, ELT Pipeline Design, dbt.

• MLOps & Platform: Model Registry, CI/CD for ML, A/B Testing, Shadow
  Deployment, Model Drift Monitoring, Kubeflow, Vertex AI Pipelines.

• Data Quality & Governance: Feature Store Governance, Data Versioning
  with DVC, Model Cards, Explainability (SHAP, LIME), Bias Audits.

• Compliance & Risk Management: RBI AI Guidelines, GDPR for ML Models,
  Model Risk Management (MRM), Audit Trails, Fairness Frameworks.

• Learning & Development: ML Reading Groups, Intern Supervision,
  Kaggle Team Leadership, University Guest Lectures.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

Machine Learning & AI Ecosystems
• Frameworks: Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, XGBoost, LightGBM,
  Hugging Face Transformers, SpaCy, NLTK, OpenCV.
• MLOps: MLflow, Kubeflow, Vertex AI Pipelines, BentoML, Seldon Core,
  DVC, Weights & Biases, Feast (Feature Store), Evidently AI.

Cloud Platforms
• GCP: Vertex AI, BigQuery ML, Dataflow, Pub/Sub, Cloud Composer, GCS.
• AWS: SageMaker, S3, Lambda, Kinesis, Glue, Redshift, CloudWatch.
• Azure: Azure ML, Databricks, Data Factory, Synapse Analytics, ADLS.

Data & Analytics
• Databases: BigQuery, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Cassandra, Redis, MongoDB.
• BI & Reporting: Looker, Tableau, Power BI, Metabase, Google Data Studio.
• DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Cloud Build, ArgoCD.
• Languages: Python, SQL, R, Scala, PySpark, Bash.


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Lead Data Scientist | PaySmart Fintech | 2021 – Present
Bengaluru, KA (Digital Payments & Lending Platform | 4,200 Employees)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed to lead the centralization
of ML capabilities across 4 product squads. Responsible for the ML platform
architecture, model governance, and a team of 5 data scientists and 2 ML
engineers.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• ML Platform Centralization: Architected a unified Vertex AI-based ML
  platform consolidating 7 siloed model environments. Reduced model
  deployment time from 3 weeks to 2 days and improved model accuracy by 31%.
• Credit Scoring Model: Built and deployed an XGBoost-based credit risk model
  processing 500K+ loan applications monthly. Reduced default rate by 18%
  compared to the legacy rule-based system.
• Real-Time Fraud Detection: Deployed a streaming anomaly detection model
  on GCP Dataflow processing 2M+ daily transactions. Reduced fraud losses
  by ₹12 Cr annually within 6 months of deployment.
• Feature Store Implementation: Built a Feast-based feature store serving
  shared features to 8 production models, eliminating duplicate feature
  computation and saving 40% in Dataflow costs.
• Model Monitoring: Implemented Evidently AI dashboards for drift detection
  across all production models, reducing silent model degradation incidents
  from 6/year to zero.


Senior Data Scientist | Bajaj Allianz General Insurance | 2018 – 2021
Pune, MH (General Insurance | 12,000 Employees)

Operational Leadership: Led predictive analytics initiatives for claims
management, underwriting, and customer churn reduction across a portfolio
of 8M+ policyholders.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Claims Fraud Detection: Built an ensemble model (Random Forest + LightGBM)
  identifying fraudulent claims with 91% precision. Saved ₹18 Cr in fraudulent
  payouts in Year 1.
• Churn Prediction Model: Deployed a customer churn model using AWS
  SageMaker reducing policyholder attrition by 14% through targeted
  retention campaigns.
• NLP for Claims Triage: Built a SpaCy-based NLP classifier to auto-categorize
  incoming claim documents, reducing manual triage effort by 65%.
• Actuarial Data Pipeline: Designed a BigQuery-based data pipeline feeding
  actuarial models with clean, versioned data, replacing error-prone Excel
  extracts used by 30+ actuaries.


Data Analyst & Junior Data Scientist | Zivame (Reliance Retail) | 2015 – 2018
Bengaluru, KA (D2C Fashion E-Commerce)

Role Overview: Transitioned from data analyst to junior data scientist,
building recommendation systems and customer segmentation models for a
leading fashion platform.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Recommendation Engine: Built a collaborative filtering recommendation
  system increasing average order value by 22% and click-through rate by 35%.
• Customer Segmentation: Developed RFM + K-Means clustering model
  segmenting 3M+ customers, enabling personalized email campaigns with
  2x open rates vs. generic blasts.
• A/B Testing Framework: Designed a Python-based A/B testing framework
  used by 5 product teams, standardizing experiment analysis company-wide.


Data Analyst | Cognizant Technology Solutions | 2014 – 2015
Chennai, TN (IT Services)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Reporting Automation: Built Python scripts to automate 25 weekly client
  reports, saving 15 analyst hours per week.
• Dashboard Development: Designed Tableau dashboards for a US retail client
  sourcing from Redshift, reducing report delivery from 2 days to 2 hours.
• Data Cleaning Pipeline: Built reusable pandas-based data cleaning pipelines
  improving data quality scores from 71% to 96% for downstream ML use.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Nucleus: Centralized ML Platform on Vertex AI
Role: Platform Architect | Investment: ₹4.1 Cr | Duration: 20 Months
• Objective: Unify 7 siloed ML environments into a single governed platform
  with shared feature store, model registry, and monitoring.
• Strategy: Used Vertex AI Pipelines for orchestration, Feast for feature
  serving, MLflow for experiment tracking, and Evidently AI for monitoring.
• Outcome: Reduced model deployment lead time by 85%. Platform now serves
  12 production models with zero unplanned downtime in 14 months.

Project Sentinel: Real-Time Fraud Intelligence
Role: Lead Data Scientist | Objective: Replace rule-based fraud system with ML.
• Strategy: Deployed GCP Dataflow for real-time scoring, XGBoost for the
  classification model, and Looker for fraud analyst dashboards.
• Outcome: Reduced fraud losses by ₹12 Cr in Year 1. False positive rate
  improved by 40%, reducing friction for legitimate customers.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 7 data scientists; 2 promoted to lead roles.
  Lead a monthly internal ML paper reading group with 20+ participants.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partnered with engineering, product, risk,
  and compliance teams to deliver end-to-end ML products.
• Agile Delivery: Managed a 7-member data science squad using Jira and
  Confluence; maintained 85%+ sprint velocity across 30 sprints.
• Change Management: Drove adoption of MLOps standards across 3 squads
  through hands-on workshops, documentation, and model review templates.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• Automated Retraining: Built triggered retraining pipelines on Vertex AI
  activated by drift alerts, reducing manual retraining effort by 90%.
• Model Card Automation: Developed a script to auto-generate model cards
  from MLflow metadata, ensuring 100% documentation compliance.
• Data Versioning: Implemented DVC for all training datasets, enabling full
  reproducibility of every model version in production.
• Shadow Deployment Framework: Built a shadow mode A/B testing harness
  allowing new models to run in parallel before full traffic cutover.


EDUCATION

Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
International Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Bengaluru, KA

Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology
Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Coimbatore, TN


CERTIFICATIONS

• Google Professional Machine Learning Engineer – Google Cloud
• AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty
• Databricks Certified Machine Learning Professional
• TensorFlow Developer Certificate – Google
• Deep Learning Specialization – DeepLearning.AI (Coursera)

RAHUL SHARMA
Senior DevOps Engineer & Platform Reliability Lead
Noida, UP • +91 98112 34567 • rahul.sharma.devops@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/rahul-sharma-devops • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Seasoned Senior DevOps Engineer and Platform Reliability Lead with 10+ years
of experience building and operating large-scale CI/CD platforms, cloud
infrastructure, and SRE frameworks across telecom, media, and SaaS industries.
Expert in designing resilient Kubernetes-based microservices platforms using
AWS and Azure. Distinguished for leading the Platform Modernization Program
at StreamVibe Media that migrated a monolithic deployment system to a fully
containerized GitOps platform, reducing deployment frequency from weekly to
50+ deploys per day and cutting production incidents by 62%. Proven track
record of maintaining 99.99% uptime for platforms serving 15M+ users.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: Platform Engineering Roadmap, SRE Culture Adoption,
  Infrastructure Cost Governance, Vendor Management, OKR Delivery.

• CI/CD & Automation: GitOps, Pipeline Design, Blue-Green Deployments,
  Canary Releases, Feature Flags, Automated Rollbacks.

• Cloud & Infrastructure: Multi-Cloud IaC (Terraform/Pulumi), Auto-Scaling,
  FinOps, Disaster Recovery Planning, Network Architecture.

• Observability & Reliability: SLI/SLO/SLA Design, Distributed Tracing,
  Log Aggregation, Chaos Engineering, Incident Management.

• Security & Compliance: DevSecOps, SAST/DAST Integration, Secrets
  Management (Vault), CIS Benchmarks, SOC 2 Readiness.

• Container & Orchestration: Kubernetes Cluster Management, Helm Charts,
  Istio Service Mesh, Karpenter, Cluster Autoscaler.

• Learning & Development: Runbook Creation, Blameless Post-Mortems,
  On-Call Rotation Design, Internal DevOps Bootcamps.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

DevOps & Platform Ecosystems
• CI/CD Tools: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, ArgoCD, Tekton,
  Spinnaker, CircleCI, AWS CodePipeline, Azure DevOps.
• Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Pulumi, AWS CloudFormation,
  Ansible, Chef, Packer, Crossplane.

Cloud Platforms
• AWS: EKS, EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, CloudWatch, VPC, Route53, IAM, ECR.
• Azure: AKS, Azure DevOps, Monitor, Key Vault, ADLS, App Gateway, RBAC.
• GCP: GKE, Cloud Build, Cloud Run, Artifact Registry, Pub/Sub, Stackdriver.

Observability & Security
• Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, New Relic, PagerDuty, OpsGenie.
• Logging: ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana), Splunk, Loki, Fluentd.
• Security: HashiCorp Vault, Aqua Security, Trivy, Snyk, OPA/Gatekeeper.
• Languages: Python, Bash, Go, YAML, HCL (Terraform), Groovy (Jenkins DSL).


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior DevOps Engineer | StreamVibe Media | 2021 – Present
Noida, UP (OTT Streaming Platform | 5,000 Employees | 15M+ Users)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed to lead the platform
engineering transformation for a high-traffic OTT platform. Responsible for
Kubernetes infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and SRE practices across a
6-member platform engineering team.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• GitOps Platform Migration: Led the migration from Jenkins-based monolith
  deployments to a fully GitOps platform using ArgoCD and GitHub Actions.
  Increased deploy frequency from weekly to 50+ per day.
• Kubernetes Fleet Management: Designed and managed 12 EKS clusters across
  3 AWS regions serving 15M+ streaming users. Achieved 99.99% platform
  uptime over 24 consecutive months.
• Observability Overhaul: Implemented a full Prometheus + Grafana + Loki
  observability stack with 200+ dashboards and SLO-based alerting. Reduced
  MTTR from 45 minutes to under 8 minutes.
• FinOps Initiative: Introduced Karpenter-based node autoscaling and spot
  instance optimization, reducing monthly AWS compute spend by 34%.
• DevSecOps Pipeline: Integrated Trivy, Snyk, and OPA policies into all CI
  pipelines, achieving 100% container image scanning before production.


Platform Engineer | Airtel (Bharti Airtel) | 2018 – 2021
Gurgaon, HR (Telecom & Digital Services | 20,000 Employees)

Operational Leadership: Core platform engineer supporting the Airtel Xstream
and Payments Bank digital platforms, managing hybrid cloud infrastructure
across AWS and on-premises data centers.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Hybrid Cloud Migration: Migrated 120+ microservices from on-prem VMs to
  AWS EKS, reducing infrastructure provisioning time from 2 weeks to 2 hours.
• Zero-Downtime Deployment: Implemented blue-green deployment strategy for
  the Airtel Payments Bank platform, eliminating all scheduled maintenance
  windows and achieving zero-downtime releases.
• Incident Reduction: Introduced chaos engineering using Chaos Monkey,
  proactively identifying and fixing 18 latent failure modes. Production
  incidents dropped by 47% in 12 months.
• Cost Optimization: Rightsized 300+ EC2 instances using AWS Compute
  Optimizer recommendations, saving $800K annually.


DevOps Engineer | HCL Technologies | 2015 – 2018
Noida, UP (IT Services & Consulting)

Role Overview: Client-embedded DevOps engineer across banking and
manufacturing clients, focused on CI/CD pipeline design and infrastructure
automation.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Pipeline Automation: Built Jenkins-based CI/CD pipelines for a UK banking
  client, reducing build and deployment time from 4 hours to 25 minutes.
• Infrastructure Automation: Wrote Terraform modules for AWS infrastructure
  adopted across 6 client projects, eliminating manual provisioning entirely.
• Container Adoption: Introduced Docker and Kubernetes to a legacy Java
  application team, cutting server provisioning effort by 70%.


Systems Administrator | Wipro Ltd. | 2014 – 2015
Bengaluru, KA (IT Services)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Monitoring Setup: Deployed Nagios and later migrated to Prometheus for
  infrastructure monitoring across 200+ Linux servers.
• Automation Scripts: Wrote Bash and Python scripts to automate routine
  sysadmin tasks, saving 10+ hours of manual work weekly.
• Patch Management: Standardized OS patching across 500 servers using
  Ansible playbooks, reducing patch cycle time from 3 weeks to 2 days.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Velocity: GitOps-First Delivery Platform
Role: Platform Lead | Investment: ₹3.5 Cr | Duration: 14 Months
• Objective: Replace legacy Jenkins pipelines with a fully automated GitOps
  delivery platform supporting 200+ microservices.
• Strategy: ArgoCD for continuous delivery, GitHub Actions for CI, Helm for
  packaging, and OPA for policy enforcement at the cluster level.
• Outcome: Deployment frequency increased 50x. Rollback time reduced from
  2 hours to under 3 minutes via automated ArgoCD sync rollback.

Project Bedrock: Multi-Region EKS Infrastructure
Role: Infrastructure Architect | Objective: Build resilient multi-region K8s.
• Strategy: Terraform-managed EKS clusters across 3 AWS regions with
  Karpenter autoscaling, Istio service mesh, and Route53 failover routing.
• Outcome: Achieved 99.99% uptime. Disaster recovery RTO reduced from
  4 hours to under 15 minutes with automated failover.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 5 junior DevOps engineers; 2 promoted to
  senior roles. Run monthly "Platform Talks" internal knowledge sessions.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partnered with development, security, and
  product teams to embed DevOps practices into all delivery workflows.
• Agile Delivery: Managed platform engineering backlog using Jira; delivered
  95%+ of roadmap commitments on schedule across 8 quarters.
• Blameless Culture: Championed blameless post-mortem culture, producing
  detailed RCA documents for all P1 incidents shared organization-wide.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• Self-Healing Pipelines: Implemented automated pipeline retry and alerting
  logic reducing manual re-run interventions by 80%.
• Golden Path Templates: Created standardized Helm chart templates and
  Terraform modules as a "Golden Path" for all new service onboarding.
• Cost Alerting: Built AWS Cost Anomaly Detection alerts integrated with
  Slack, catching unexpected spend spikes within 15 minutes.
• Secrets Rotation Automation: Automated HashiCorp Vault secret rotation
  for all production services, achieving 100% rotation compliance.


EDUCATION

Master of Technology in Cloud Computing & Distributed Systems
Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology (IIIT Delhi), Delhi

Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science & Engineering
Uttar Pradesh Technical University (AKTU), Lucknow, UP


CERTIFICATIONS

• Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) – CNCF
• AWS Certified DevOps Engineer – Professional
• HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate
• Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist (CKS) – CNCF
• Google Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer – Google Cloud

text:
SNEHA REDDY
Senior Data Analyst & Business Intelligence Lead
Hyderabad, TS • +91 96543 21098 • sneha.reddy.bi@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/sneha-reddy-bi • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Detail-oriented Senior Data Analyst and Business Intelligence Lead with 7+
years of experience translating complex datasets into strategic business
insights across pharmaceutical, FMCG, and retail industries. Expert in
designing executive-level dashboards and self-service analytics platforms
using Tableau, Power BI, and Google BigQuery. Distinguished for building the
Enterprise Analytics Hub at SunPharma Analytics Division that centralized
reporting for 12 business units into a single governed BI platform, reducing
report generation time by 78% and enabling data-driven decisions for 300+
business users. Proven track record of driving $2.8M in cost savings through
analytical insights and process automation.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: BI Platform Strategy, Analytics Roadmap, Executive
  Storytelling with Data, Stakeholder Management, Agile Analytics Delivery.

• Data Analysis & Visualization: Dashboard Design, KPI Framework Development,
  Ad-Hoc Analysis, Trend Forecasting, Cohort Analysis, Funnel Analysis.

• Data Engineering Fundamentals: SQL Query Optimization, ETL with dbt,
  Data Modeling (Star/Snowflake Schema), Data Pipeline Monitoring.

• Advanced Analytics: Statistical Analysis, A/B Testing, Regression Modeling,
  Forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet), Customer Segmentation (K-Means).

• Data Quality & Governance: Data Dictionary Management, Data Stewardship,
  Quality Scorecards, Metadata Management, Row-Level Security in BI Tools.

• Compliance & Risk Management: GxP Data Integrity (Pharma), GDPR
  Compliance for Analytics, Audit-Ready Reporting, Validated Systems.

• Learning & Development: Analytics Literacy Training, Dashboard Design
  Reviews, SQL Upskilling Workshops, Intern Mentoring.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

BI & Visualization Ecosystems
• Dashboarding: Tableau (Desktop, Server, Prep), Power BI (Desktop, Service,
  Dataflows), Looker, Google Data Studio, Metabase, Qlik Sense.
• Advanced Features: Tableau LOD Expressions, Power BI DAX, Row-Level
  Security, Embedded Analytics, Tableau Extensions.

Data Platforms & Databases
• Cloud DW: Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, Azure Synapse Analytics,
  Snowflake, Databricks SQL.
• Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle 11g, MS SQL Server, SQLite.
• ETL & Transformation: dbt, AWS Glue, Informatica, Talend, Fivetran, Stitch.

Analytics & Programming
• Languages: SQL, Python (pandas, NumPy, matplotlib, seaborn), R (ggplot2).
• Statistical Tools: SPSS, Excel (Power Query, Power Pivot, VBA), SAS basics.
• Cloud Platforms: GCP (BigQuery, Looker, Data Studio), AWS (Redshift, Athena).
• Collaboration: Jira, Confluence, Slack, Microsoft Teams, Notion.


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Data Analyst & BI Lead | Sun Pharmaceutical Industries | 2021 – Present
Hyderabad, TS (Global Pharmaceutical Company | 35,000 Employees)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed to build and lead the
Enterprise Analytics Hub for the India operations division. Responsible for
centralizing BI reporting for 12 business units and managing a 4-member
analytics team.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Enterprise Analytics Hub: Built a centralized Tableau Server + BigQuery
  platform consolidating reporting for 12 business units. Reduced report
  generation time by 78% and enabled self-service analytics for 300+ users.
• Sales Performance Dashboard: Designed a real-time sales analytics dashboard
  tracking 500+ SKUs across 28 states. Used by the national sales team of 1,200+
  reps, improving territory planning accuracy by 40%.
• Supply Chain Analytics: Built a Power BI dashboard monitoring inventory
  turnover, stockouts, and supplier lead times. Identified ₹4.2 Cr in excess
  inventory, enabling targeted write-down decisions.
• GxP Compliance Reporting: Designed validated analytical reports for
  regulatory submissions meeting 21 CFR Part 11 and GxP data integrity
  requirements, passing 3 external audits without findings.
• dbt Transformation Layer: Implemented dbt for all BigQuery transformation
  logic, introducing tested, version-controlled SQL models for 40+ dashboards.


Data Analyst | ITC Limited (FMCG Division) | 2018 – 2021
Hyderabad, TS (Diversified FMCG Conglomerate | 25,000 Employees)

Operational Leadership: Core data analyst supporting the Foods and Personal
Care divisions, responsible for market analytics, trade promotion analysis,
and distributor performance reporting.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Trade Promotion Analytics: Built an Excel + Tableau model to measure ROI
  of 200+ annual trade promotions. Identified underperforming schemes saving
  ₹6 Cr in wasted promotion spend per year.
• Distributor Scorecard: Designed a Power BI distributor performance scorecard
  tracking 3,000+ distributors across India, enabling regional managers to
  identify at-risk accounts 6 weeks earlier than before.
• Demand Forecasting: Built a Python Prophet-based forecasting model for
  seasonal SKUs, improving forecast accuracy from 68% to 87%.
• Reporting Automation: Automated 30+ weekly Excel reports using Python
  and pandas, saving 20+ analyst hours per week.


Junior Data Analyst | Deloitte India | 2015 – 2018
Hyderabad, TS (Professional Services & Consulting)

Role Overview: Junior analyst in the data and analytics practice, supporting
client engagements across retail and healthcare verticals.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Retail Client Dashboard: Built Tableau dashboards for a US retail client
  tracking store-level P&L, reducing CFO reporting preparation from 3 days
  to 4 hours.
• Healthcare Analytics: Designed patient outcome tracking reports for an
  Indian hospital chain using SQL and Excel, improving discharge planning
  efficiency by 25%.
• Process Documentation: Created 20+ dashboard user guides and data
  dictionary documents adopted as team standards.


Data Intern | NASSCOM Foundation | 2014 – 2015
Hyderabad, TS (Non-Profit Technology Advocacy)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Impact Reporting: Built Excel-based dashboards to track program KPIs for
  3 social impact initiatives, presented to board members quarterly.
• Data Cleaning: Cleaned and standardized a 500K-row beneficiary dataset
  using Python, improving data usability for grant reporting by 60%.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Lens: Enterprise Analytics Hub
Role: BI Lead | Investment: ₹1.8 Cr | Duration: 12 Months
• Objective: Centralize fragmented Excel and email-based reporting into a
  governed, self-service Tableau + BigQuery analytics platform.
• Strategy: Used Fivetran for ingestion, dbt for transformation, BigQuery
  as the warehouse, and Tableau Server for governed dashboard delivery.
• Outcome: 300+ active self-service users. Report delivery time reduced
  from 3 days to under 2 hours. Dashboard adoption rate of 94%.

Project Clarity: Supply Chain Visibility Dashboard
Role: Lead Analyst | Objective: Real-time inventory and supplier analytics.
• Strategy: Connected SAP data via Fivetran to BigQuery, built dbt models
  for inventory KPIs, and delivered Power BI dashboards with drill-through.
• Outcome: Identified ₹4.2 Cr in excess inventory. Reduced stockout
  incidents by 33% through proactive reorder point monitoring.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 4 junior analysts; 1 promoted to senior
  role. Run monthly "Viz Review" sessions critiquing dashboard design.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Worked with finance, supply chain, sales,
  and IT teams to gather requirements and deliver shared analytics assets.
• Agile Delivery: Managed analytics sprint board in Jira; delivered 90%+
  of committed stories across 20 sprints.
• Change Management: Led transition of 5 teams from Excel reporting to
  self-service Tableau through training sessions and dashboard templates.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• Automated Refresh Monitoring: Built a Python script to monitor Tableau
  data source refresh failures and alert via Slack, reducing stale dashboards
  from 10/week to zero.
• dbt Testing Framework: Implemented dbt tests (not-null, unique, accepted
  values) across all 40+ models, catching data issues before dashboards refresh.
• Report Cataloging: Built a Confluence-based analytics catalog documenting
  all 150+ reports with owner, refresh cadence, and data source metadata.
• Self-Service Query Tool: Deployed Metabase connected to BigQuery for
  ad-hoc querying by non-technical business users, reducing analyst ad-hoc
  request volume by 45%.


EDUCATION

Master of Business Administration (Analytics & Operations)
Indian School of Business (ISB), Hyderabad, TS

Bachelor of Science in Statistics & Mathematics
Osmania University, Hyderabad, TS


CERTIFICATIONS

• Tableau Desktop Certified Professional – Tableau (Salesforce)
• Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL-300)
• Google Professional Data Engineer – Google Cloud
• dbt Certified Developer – dbt Labs
• Snowflake SnowPro Core Certification – Snowflake

text:
KARTHIK SUBRAMANIAM
Senior Cloud Architect & Infrastructure Lead
Chennai, TN • +91 94456 78901 • karthik.subbu.cloud@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/karthik-subramaniam-cloud • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Strategic Senior Cloud Architect and Infrastructure Lead with 11+ years of
experience designing and governing enterprise cloud platforms across banking,
insurance, and manufacturing industries. Expert in multi-cloud architecture
using AWS, Azure, and GCP with deep specialization in network design, security
architecture, and cloud cost optimization. Distinguished for leading the Cloud
First Transformation at Cholamandalam Finance that migrated 80% of workloads
from on-premises data centers to a hybrid AWS-Azure cloud, reducing
infrastructure OpEx by $5.2M annually and cutting provisioning time from
3 weeks to 4 hours. Proven track record of designing platforms supporting
10,000+ users with 99.95%+ availability SLAs.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: Cloud Architecture Governance, Technology Roadmap,
  FinOps Strategy, Board-Level Reporting, Vendor Negotiation.

• Cloud Architecture: Well-Architected Framework, Landing Zone Design,
  Hybrid & Multi-Cloud Strategy, Cloud-Native Patterns, Serverless Design.

• Networking & Security: Zero Trust Architecture, VPC/VNet Design, WAF,
  DDoS Protection, Private Connectivity (Direct Connect/ExpressRoute).

• Infrastructure as Code & Automation: Terraform, Pulumi, AWS CDK,
  CloudFormation, Ansible, GitOps for Infrastructure.

• Cost Management & FinOps: Reserved Instance Strategy, Savings Plans,
  Rightsizing, Chargeback Models, Cloud Cost Allocation Tagging.

• Compliance & Risk Management: RBI Cloud Guidelines, ISO 27001, SOC 2,
  PCI-DSS, SEBI Cloud Circular, Business Continuity & DR Planning.

• Learning & Development: Cloud CoE Leadership, Architecture Review
  Boards, Internal Cloud Certification Programs, Partner Enablement.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

Cloud Architecture Ecosystems
• AWS: VPC, EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, CloudFront, Direct Connect, Transit Gateway,
  Control Tower, Organizations, Security Hub, GuardDuty, WAF, Shield.
• Azure: VNet, AKS, Azure SQL, ADLS, ExpressRoute, Virtual WAN, Defender
  for Cloud, Sentinel, Azure Policy, Blueprints, Private Link.
• GCP: VPC, GKE, Cloud SQL, GCS, Interconnect, Apigee, Security Command
  Center, Cloud Armor, Organization Policies.

Infrastructure & Automation
• IaC: Terraform (Expert), Pulumi, AWS CDK, Ansible, Packer, Crossplane.
• CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, Jenkins, ArgoCD, Spinnaker.
• Containers: Kubernetes (EKS/AKS/GKE), Docker, Helm, Istio, Karpenter.

Observability & Security
• Monitoring: Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch, Azure Monitor.
• Security: HashiCorp Vault, Prisma Cloud, Aqua Security, CyberArk, Okta.
• Languages: Python, Bash, Go, HCL (Terraform), YAML, PowerShell.


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Cloud Architect | Cholamandalam Investment & Finance | 2021 – Present
Chennai, TN (Leading NBFC | Financial Services | 10,000+ Employees)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed as enterprise cloud
architect to lead the Cloud First Transformation Program. Responsible for
multi-cloud governance, architecture standards, and a 7-member cloud
platform team.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Cloud First Migration: Led the migration of 200+ workloads from on-prem
  data centers to AWS and Azure. Reduced infrastructure OpEx by $5.2M/yr
  and provisioning time from 3 weeks to 4 hours.
• Landing Zone Design: Designed and implemented an AWS Control Tower
  multi-account landing zone with 15 accounts, enforcing security guardrails
  and compliance policies via SCPs and AWS Config rules.
• Zero Trust Network: Architected a Zero Trust security model with Okta
  for identity, Prisma Cloud for workload protection, and AWS PrivateLink
  for all internal service communication. Passed RBI cloud audit first attempt.
• FinOps Program: Established a FinOps function with monthly chargeback
  reporting to 8 business units. Identified and actioned $1.8M in annual
  waste through rightsizing and Reserved Instance purchases.
• DR & Business Continuity: Designed active-passive DR architecture across
  2 AWS regions, achieving RPO of 15 minutes and RTO of 45 minutes for
  all Tier-1 banking applications.


Cloud Engineer | Cognizant Technology Solutions | 2018 – 2021
Chennai, TN (IT Services & Consulting)

Operational Leadership: Senior cloud engineer on the Financial Services
practice, leading cloud architecture and migration engagements for US and
UK banking clients.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• US Bank Migration: Architected the AWS migration of a 60-application
  portfolio for a mid-size US bank. Delivered on time and 12% under budget,
  saving the client $900K.
• Azure DevOps Adoption: Implemented Azure DevOps pipelines for a UK
  insurance client, reducing release cycle from monthly to weekly.
• Network Architecture: Designed a hub-and-spoke AWS Transit Gateway
  network for a multi-region retail client, replacing expensive MPLS links
  and saving $400K annually in WAN costs.
• Security Posture: Deployed AWS Security Hub and GuardDuty across a
  client's 8 AWS accounts, achieving CIS Benchmark compliance within 60 days.


Systems & Cloud Engineer | TVS Motor Company | 2015 – 2018
Chennai, TN (Automotive Manufacturing | 5,000 Employees)

Role Overview: Core systems engineer managing on-premises infrastructure
and leading the initial AWS cloud adoption for the IT division.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• AWS Pilot: Designed and deployed the company's first AWS environment
  hosting 15 non-critical applications, establishing cloud governance standards.
• VMware Optimization: Consolidated 300 physical servers to 60 VMware
  hosts, reducing data center power consumption by 40%.
• Backup Modernization: Replaced tape backup with AWS S3 + Glacier,
  reducing backup costs by 65% and improving restore time from days to hours.


Systems Administrator | Tata Consultancy Services | 2013 – 2015
Chennai, TN (IT Services)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Infrastructure Support: Managed 200+ Windows and Linux servers for a
  manufacturing client, maintaining 99.9% uptime over 2 years.
• Automation: Wrote PowerShell and Bash scripts for routine admin tasks,
  saving 8 hours of manual work per week.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Horizon: Cloud First Transformation
Role: Chief Architect | Investment: ₹8.5 Cr | Duration: 24 Months
• Objective: Migrate 200+ on-prem workloads to a governed multi-cloud
  platform meeting RBI and SEBI regulatory requirements.
• Strategy: AWS Control Tower for governance, Terraform for IaC, Prisma
  Cloud for security, and Datadog for unified observability.
• Outcome: $5.2M annual OpEx reduction. 100% compliance with RBI cloud
  circular. Provisioning time reduced by 95%.

Project Fortress: Zero Trust Security Architecture
Role: Security Architect | Objective: Eliminate implicit trust in the network.
• Strategy: Okta for identity, AWS PrivateLink for service connectivity,
  CyberArk for privileged access, and Prisma Cloud for workload security.
• Outcome: Passed RBI cloud security audit without any major findings.
  Lateral movement attack surface reduced by 85% per penetration test.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 6 cloud engineers; 3 achieved AWS
  certifications under my guidance. Lead monthly Architecture Review Boards.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partnered with security, compliance, finance,
  and application teams to deliver cloud governance standards organization-wide.
• Agile Delivery: Managed cloud platform roadmap using Jira; delivered 92%
  of planned initiatives on schedule across 4 annual planning cycles.
• Cloud CoE: Founded and lead the company's Cloud Center of Excellence,
  running quarterly training sessions for 40+ engineers.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• Terraform Module Library: Built a library of 30+ reusable Terraform modules
  for common AWS and Azure patterns, reducing new environment setup from
  2 weeks to 4 hours.
• Cost Anomaly Automation: Deployed AWS Cost Anomaly Detection with
  Slack alerts, catching budget overruns within 1 hour of occurrence.
• Compliance as Code: Implemented AWS Config rules and Azure Policy for
  automated compliance checking across all 15 accounts, replacing manual
  quarterly audits with continuous monitoring.
• AMI Factory: Built a Packer-based golden AMI pipeline producing hardened,
  patched base images weekly, ensuring all EC2 instances start from
  security-approved baselines.


EDUCATION

Master of Technology in Computer Networks & Cloud Computing
Anna University, Chennai, TN

Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics & Communication
College of Engineering, Guindy (CEG), Chennai, TN


CERTIFICATIONS

• AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
• Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ-305)
• Google Professional Cloud Architect – Google Cloud
• HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate
• Certified Cloud Security Professional (CCSP) – ISC2

text:
ANANYA IYER
Senior Full Stack Engineer & Backend Systems Lead
Bengaluru, KA • +91 87654 32109 • ananya.iyer.dev@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/ananya-iyer-fullstack • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

High-impact Senior Full Stack Engineer and Backend Systems Lead with 9+ years
of experience designing and delivering scalable web platforms and microservices
architectures across edtech, healthtech, and B2B SaaS industries. Expert in
building high-performance backend systems using Node.js, Python (FastAPI/Django),
and Go, paired with React-based frontends. Distinguished for architecting the
Core Platform Rewrite at EduSpark Technologies that migrated a PHP monolith
to a microservices architecture on AWS, reducing page load times by 64% and
supporting a 10x growth in concurrent users from 50K to 500K. Proven track
record of shipping 30+ production features quarterly with 99.9%+ availability.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: Technical Roadmap Ownership, System Design Reviews,
  Engineering Team Growth, Sprint Planning, Cross-Squad Coordination.

• Backend Engineering: RESTful & GraphQL API Design, Microservices,
  Event-Driven Architecture, gRPC, Async Processing, Caching Strategies.

• Frontend Engineering: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Component Libraries,
  Performance Optimization, Accessibility (WCAG), Micro-Frontends.

• Data & Storage: Relational DB Design, NoSQL Modeling, Search (Elasticsearch),
  Caching (Redis), Message Queues (Kafka/SQS), CDN Strategy.

• DevOps & Reliability: CI/CD Pipeline Ownership, Docker, Kubernetes,
  Observability, On-Call Engineering, SLO Design.

• Security & Compliance: OWASP Top 10 Remediation, JWT/OAuth2/OIDC,
  GDPR for Web Apps, Penetration Test Remediation, Rate Limiting.

• Learning & Development: Code Review Standards, Tech Spec Templates,
  Engineering Blog Contributions, Junior Developer Mentoring.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

Backend & API Ecosystems
• Languages & Frameworks: Node.js (Express, NestJS), Python (FastAPI,
  Django, Flask), Go (Gin, Echo), Java (Spring Boot), Ruby on Rails.
• APIs: REST, GraphQL (Apollo), gRPC, WebSockets, Webhooks, OpenAPI.
• Async & Messaging: Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ, AWS SQS/SNS, Bull (Redis
  Queue), Celery, AWS EventBridge.

Frontend & Mobile
• Frameworks: React, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Storybook.
• State Management: Redux, Zustand, React Query, Context API.
• Testing: Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, Playwright.

Data & Infrastructure
• Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, DynamoDB.
• Cloud: AWS (EC2, ECS, Lambda, RDS, S3, CloudFront, SQS), GCP (Cloud Run).
• DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Datadog, Sentry.


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Full Stack Engineer | EduSpark Technologies | 2021 – Present
Bengaluru, KA (EdTech SaaS Platform | 800 Employees | 5M+ Learners)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed as the backend systems
lead for the platform engineering squad. Responsible for core API design,
microservices architecture, and a 4-member full stack team.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Monolith to Microservices: Led the rewrite of a PHP monolith into 14 Node.js
  and Python microservices on AWS ECS. Reduced page load time by 64% and
  supported 10x concurrent user growth (50K to 500K).
• Live Class Platform: Built a WebSocket-based real-time collaboration system
  supporting 10,000 concurrent users per live class with sub-200ms latency.
  Reduced infrastructure cost by 35% vs. third-party alternatives.
• Search & Discovery: Implemented Elasticsearch-powered course search with
  fuzzy matching and personalized ranking. Improved search click-through
  rate by 48% and reduced zero-result searches from 22% to 4%.
• Payment Gateway Integration: Engineered a unified payment orchestration
  layer integrating Razorpay, Stripe, and PayPal with retry logic and
  idempotency, achieving 99.97% payment success rate.
• API Performance: Implemented Redis caching and database query optimization
  across 30 high-traffic API endpoints, reducing P95 response time from
  1,200ms to 85ms.


Backend Engineer | Practo Technologies | 2018 – 2021
Bengaluru, KA (Digital Health Platform | 1,200 Employees)

Operational Leadership: Core backend engineer on the appointments and
teleconsultation squad, building APIs and data pipelines for a platform
serving 5M+ monthly patients and 100,000+ doctors.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Teleconsultation Platform: Built the backend for a video consultation
  feature using WebRTC signaling server and Twilio, scaling to 50,000+
  daily consultations during COVID-19 peak.
• Appointment Engine: Redesigned the slot availability algorithm using a
  Redis-based scheduling engine, reducing slot calculation latency from
  3 seconds to 40ms for 100K+ doctor calendars.
• Notification System: Designed an event-driven notification service using
  Kafka + SNS delivering SMS, email, and push notifications with 99.5%
  delivery rate to 5M+ monthly active users.
• HIPAA-Aligned API Security: Implemented field-level encryption and audit
  logging for all patient health record APIs, passing 2 HIPAA readiness audits.


Full Stack Developer | Freshworks | 2015 – 2018
Chennai, TN (B2B SaaS | CRM & Customer Engagement)

Role Overview: Full stack developer on the Freshdesk product team, building
customer-facing features and internal tooling for a globally used helpdesk SaaS.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Bulk Action Feature: Engineered a bulk ticket action system processing
  100K+ records asynchronously using Sidekiq and Redis, replacing a
  synchronous flow that timed out beyond 500 records.
• React Migration: Migrated 15 legacy Backbone.js modules to React,
  improving UI rendering speed by 3x and reducing frontend bug count by 40%.
• Multi-Language Support: Built the i18n framework supporting 12 languages
  for Freshdesk, enabling expansion into non-English markets contributing
  to 25% international revenue growth in FY2017.


Junior Developer | Zoho Corporation | 2014 – 2015
Chennai, TN (Enterprise SaaS)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Feature Development: Built 8 UI components for Zoho CRM using JavaScript
  and Java, shipped in 2 quarterly releases.
• Bug Reduction: Identified and fixed 45+ production bugs during a dedicated
  quality sprint, improving customer satisfaction scores by 12%.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Nova: Microservices Platform Migration
Role: Backend Lead | Investment: ₹5.2 Cr | Duration: 18 Months
• Objective: Decompose a PHP monolith into a scalable microservices platform
  supporting 10x user growth without infrastructure cost increase.
• Strategy: Domain-driven design for service boundaries, Node.js and Python
  for services, AWS ECS for orchestration, Kafka for async events.
• Outcome: 64% reduction in page load time. Platform now supports 500K
  concurrent users. Deployment frequency increased from monthly to daily.

Project Pulse: Real-Time Teleconsultation Backend
Role: Lead Engineer | Objective: Build scalable video consultation platform.
• Strategy: WebRTC for peer-to-peer video, custom signaling server in Node.js,
  Twilio for PSTN fallback, Redis for session state management.
• Outcome: Scaled to 50,000+ daily consultations. 99.8% session success
  rate. Infrastructure cost 35% lower than evaluated third-party alternatives.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 5 junior and mid-level developers; 2 have
  been promoted to senior roles. Conduct bi-weekly 1:1 technical coaching.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partnered with product, design, QA, and
  DevOps to deliver features from spec to production in 2-week sprints.
• Agile Delivery: Led squad ceremonies for a 6-member team; maintained
  92%+ sprint delivery rate over 18 months.
• Engineering Standards: Authored the squad's API design guidelines,
  code review checklist, and tech spec template adopted organization-wide.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• API Contract Testing: Implemented Pact-based consumer-driven contract
  testing between 8 microservices, eliminating 90% of cross-service
  regression bugs at deploy time.
• Automated Load Testing: Set up k6-based load tests in the CI pipeline
  to gate production deployments if P95 latency exceeds defined thresholds.
• Database Migration Automation: Implemented Flyway for versioned DB
  migrations across all microservices, eliminating manual migration errors.
• Synthetic Monitoring: Deployed Datadog Synthetics for critical user journeys,
  detecting production issues before user-reported tickets.


EDUCATION

Master of Science in Software Engineering
BITS Pilani (Birla Institute of Technology & Science), Pilani, RJ

Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore, TN


CERTIFICATIONS

• AWS Certified Developer – Associate
• MongoDB Associate Developer Certification – MongoDB University
• Professional Scrum Developer (PSD I) – Scrum.org
• Node.js Application Developer (JSNAD) – OpenJS Foundation
• Elastic Certified Engineer – Elastic

text:
VIKRAM PATEL
Senior Data Warehouse Engineer & Analytics Platform Lead
Ahmedabad, GJ • +91 93456 78012 • vikram.patel.dw@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/vikram-patel-datawarehouse • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Accomplished Senior Data Warehouse Engineer and Analytics Platform Lead
with 9+ years of experience designing and optimizing enterprise data warehouses
and analytical platforms across manufacturing, retail banking, and energy
industries. Expert in building cloud-native data warehouses on Snowflake,
Amazon Redshift, and Azure Synapse Analytics with robust ELT transformation
layers. Distinguished for leading the Analytics Modernization Program at
Torrent Power that replaced a decade-old Oracle DW with a Snowflake-based
cloud data platform, improving query performance by 80% and reducing
reporting infrastructure costs by $2.4M annually. Proven track record of
designing warehousing solutions handling 10TB+ data for 400+ business users.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: DW Architecture Governance, Analytics Platform
  Roadmap, Data Modeling Standards, Stakeholder Alignment, Team Leadership.

• Data Warehousing: Dimensional Modeling (Star/Snowflake/Galaxy Schema),
  SCD Types 1/2/3, Data Vault 2.0, Slowly Changing Dimensions, Fact Design.

• ELT & Transformation: dbt (Expert), SQL-based Transformation, Stored
  Procedures, Data Quality Testing, Incremental Model Design.

• Cloud Data Platforms: Snowflake Architecture (Virtual Warehouses, Clustering,
  Zero-Copy Cloning), Redshift Spectrum, Azure Synapse Dedicated Pools.

• Data Ingestion & Integration: Fivetran, Airbyte, Stitch, AWS Glue,
  Azure Data Factory, Change Data Capture, Reverse ETL (Census, Hightouch).

• Compliance & Risk Management: SOX Financial Data Controls, GDPR Data
  Residency, Row-Level Security, Column Masking, Audit Logging.

• Learning & Development: dbt Best Practices Evangelism, SQL Optimization
  Workshops, Data Modeling Review Boards, Intern Mentoring.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

Data Warehouse & Analytics Ecosystems
• Cloud DW: Snowflake (Expert), Amazon Redshift, Azure Synapse Analytics,
  Google BigQuery, Databricks SQL, Teradata (legacy).
• Data Modeling: Star Schema, Snowflake Schema, Data Vault 2.0, OBT
  (One Big Table), Dimensional Modeling (Kimball), Inmon methodology.
• ELT & Transformation: dbt Core & Cloud, SQL, Stored Procedures,
  Spark SQL, Jinja templating, dbt Tests, dbt Docs.

Ingestion & Orchestration
• Ingestion Tools: Fivetran, Airbyte, Stitch, AWS Glue, Azure Data Factory,
  Talend, Informatica, CDC (Debezium).
• Orchestration: Apache Airflow, dbt Cloud Scheduler, AWS Step Functions,
  Prefect, Dagster.
• Reverse ETL: Census, Hightouch for syncing warehouse data to CRMs/MAPs.

BI & Analytics Layer
• BI Tools: Tableau, Power BI, Looker, Metabase, Sigma Computing.
• Languages: SQL (Expert), Python (pandas, SQLAlchemy), dbt (Jinja+SQL).
• Cloud Platforms: Snowflake, AWS (Redshift, S3, Glue), Azure (Synapse, ADF).


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Data Warehouse Engineer | Torrent Power Ltd. | 2021 – Present
Ahmedabad, GJ (Integrated Power Utility | 7,000 Employees)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed to lead the Analytics
Modernization Program, replacing a legacy Oracle DW with a cloud-native
Snowflake platform. Responsible for DW architecture, dbt transformation
standards, and a 5-member data engineering team.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Snowflake DW Migration: Migrated 10TB+ from Oracle DW to Snowflake,
  redesigning 200+ ETL jobs as dbt models. Improved query performance by
  80% and reduced infrastructure costs by $2.4M annually.
• dbt Transformation Layer: Built a dbt project with 150+ models, 300+ tests,
  and auto-generated documentation. Reduced SQL bugs reported by analysts
  from 20/month to under 2/month.
• Automated Ingestion: Implemented Fivetran to ingest data from 18 source
  systems (SAP, Salesforce, Oracle EBS) into Snowflake, replacing manual
  ETL scripts that required 3 FTEs to maintain.
• Real-Time Financial Reporting: Designed Snowflake Dynamic Tables for
  near-real-time P&L reporting, reducing financial close reporting time
  from 4 days to 6 hours.
• Data Governance: Implemented Snowflake Row-Level Security and Column
  Masking for all sensitive financial and HR datasets, achieving SOX
  compliance across 400+ warehouse objects.


Data Engineer | Axis Bank | 2018 – 2021
Mumbai, MH (Private Sector Bank | Financial Services | 70,000 Employees)

Operational Leadership: Core data warehouse engineer supporting retail
banking analytics, risk reporting, and regulatory submissions for RBI.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Regulatory Reporting DW: Designed a Redshift-based data mart for RBI
  regulatory reports (Basel III, CRAR), replacing a manual process. Reduced
  regulatory report preparation time from 5 days to 8 hours.
• Customer 360 Model: Built a dimensional model consolidating data from
  10 source systems into a unified Customer 360 view for 20M+ accounts.
  Enabled cross-sell analytics that improved campaign response rate by 28%.
• ETL Optimization: Rewrote 80 underperforming Informatica workflows using
  SQL pushdown optimization, reducing batch processing time by 55%.
• Data Quality Framework: Implemented Great Expectations data quality
  checks on all ingestion pipelines, reducing downstream report errors by 70%.


ETL Developer | Larsen & Toubro Infotech (LTI) | 2015 – 2018
Mumbai, MH (IT Services & Engineering)

Role Overview: ETL developer on manufacturing and energy client projects,
designing data warehouse solutions and migration pipelines.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Manufacturing Analytics DW: Designed a star-schema Redshift DW for a
  German manufacturing client consolidating production, quality, and supply
  chain data from SAP and Oracle, enabling unified OEE reporting.
• Informatica Optimization: Tuned 50+ Informatica PowerCenter sessions,
  reducing batch processing window from 8 hours to 3 hours.
• Client Migration: Led the migration of a legacy SQL Server DW to Amazon
  Redshift for an energy client, delivering 3 weeks ahead of schedule.


Data Analyst | KPMG India | 2014 – 2015
Ahmedabad, GJ (Professional Services)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Financial Audit Analytics: Built SQL-based data analysis scripts for
  financial audit sampling, reducing manual sample selection time by 60%.
• Dashboard Development: Created Tableau dashboards for internal audit
  KPIs, improving audit committee reporting quality.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Luminary: Snowflake Analytics Platform
Role: Lead Architect | Investment: ₹3.8 Cr | Duration: 20 Months
• Objective: Replace Oracle DW with a governed Snowflake platform serving
  400+ business users across finance, operations, and commercial teams.
• Strategy: Fivetran for ingestion, dbt for transformation, Snowflake as
  the serving layer, and Tableau for BI. Data Vault 2.0 for raw vault.
• Outcome: 80% query performance improvement. $2.4M annual cost reduction.
  150 dbt models with 99.4% test pass rate in production.

Project Atlas: Customer 360 Data Model
Role: Data Modeler | Objective: Unified customer view across 10 source systems.
• Strategy: Designed hub-satellite Data Vault model in Redshift, with
  Kimball-style business vault for reporting. Fivetran for ingestion.
• Outcome: 20M+ accounts unified into single customer profile. Cross-sell
  campaign response rate improved by 28%.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 5 data engineers in dbt and Snowflake;
  2 achieved Snowflake certifications. Lead monthly DW modeling reviews.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partnered with finance, operations, IT,
  and compliance to design data models meeting both business and audit needs.
• Agile Delivery: Managed DW development sprints using Jira; delivered
  94% of committed story points across 16 sprints.
• Standards Evangelism: Authored company DW modeling standards and dbt
  style guide adopted across all data engineering projects.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• dbt Slim CI: Implemented dbt Slim CI in GitHub Actions to run only changed
  models and their downstream dependents, reducing CI run time from 45
  minutes to 8 minutes.
• Snowflake Cost Monitoring: Built a Streamlit app on Snowflake to visualize
  warehouse credit consumption by team, reducing wasted compute by 28%.
• Schema Change Alerts: Implemented Fivetran schema change notifications
  integrated with Jira, auto-creating tickets for engineer review.
• Automated DW Documentation: Configured dbt docs with auto-generated
  data dictionaries hosted on internal Confluence, eliminating manually
  maintained spreadsheet documentation.


EDUCATION

Master of Technology in Data Engineering & Analytics
Dhirubhai Ambani Institute of Information and Communication Technology
(DA-IICT), Gandhinagar, GJ

Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology
Gujarat Technological University (GTU), Ahmedabad, GJ


CERTIFICATIONS

• Snowflake SnowPro Core Certification – Snowflake
• dbt Certified Developer – dbt Labs
• AWS Certified Data Analytics – Specialty
• Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP-203)
• Tableau Desktop Certified Professional – Tableau (Salesforce)

text:
DIVYA KRISHNAMURTHY
Senior Salesforce Architect & CRM Platform Lead
Chennai, TN • +91 98001 23456 • divya.krishna.sfdc@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/divya-krishnamurthy-sfdc • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Results-oriented Senior Salesforce Architect and CRM Platform Lead with 8+
years of experience designing and delivering enterprise Salesforce solutions
across insurance, telecommunications, and financial services industries. Expert
in architecting multi-cloud Salesforce solutions spanning Sales Cloud, Service
Cloud, Experience Cloud, and MuleSoft integration. Distinguished for leading
the CRM Consolidation Initiative at IndiaFirst Life Insurance that unified 3
legacy CRM systems into a single Salesforce platform, improving agent
productivity by 45% and reducing policy servicing time by 60%. Proven track
record of delivering 15+ end-to-end Salesforce implementations with teams of
up to 12 consultants across onshore and offshore delivery models.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: Salesforce Platform Roadmap, Solution Architecture,
  Delivery Governance, Executive Stakeholder Management, CoE Leadership.

• Salesforce Platform: Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, FSC
  (Financial Services Cloud), Health Cloud, CPQ, OmniStudio, Vlocity.

• Integration & API: MuleSoft Anypoint Platform, REST/SOAP APIs, Platform
  Events, Change Data Capture, Salesforce Connect, External Services.

• Data Architecture: Salesforce Data Model Design, Large Data Volume (LDV)
  Handling, Data Migration (SFDC DataLoader, Informatica IICS), MDM.

• DevOps & Governance: Salesforce DX, Scratch Orgs, CI/CD with Copado,
  Gearset, GitHub Actions for SFDC, Change Management Governance.

• Compliance & Risk Management: IRDA Compliance for Insurance, GDPR
  for CRM Data, Field Audit Trail, Shield Platform Encryption, VAPT.

• Learning & Development: Salesforce Internal Certification Programs,
  Trailhead Community Leadership, Mentoring Junior Developers & Admins.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

Salesforce Platform Ecosystems
• Core Clouds: Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, Marketing
  Cloud, Salesforce CPQ, Field Service Lightning (FSL), Revenue Cloud.
• Industry Clouds: Financial Services Cloud (FSC), Health Cloud, OmniStudio
  (Vlocity), Consumer Goods Cloud, Nonprofit Success Pack (NPSP).
• Development: Apex (Classes, Triggers, Batch, Queueable, Scheduled),
  LWC (Lightning Web Components), Aura, Visualforce, SOQL/SOSL.

Integration & Data
• Integration: MuleSoft Anypoint Platform, REST, SOAP, Platform Events,
  Change Data Capture, Salesforce Connect, Heroku.
• Data Tools: Salesforce Data Loader, Informatica IICS, Talend, Copado
  Essentials, DemandTools, MassMailer.
• DevOps: Salesforce DX, Copado, Gearset, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, VS Code.

Analytics & Reporting
• Salesforce Analytics: CRM Analytics (Einstein Analytics / Tableau CRM),
  Reports & Dashboards, Einstein Discovery.
• External BI: Tableau, Power BI connected to Salesforce via connector.
• Languages: Apex, LWC (JavaScript), Python (for data migration scripts).


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Salesforce Architect | IndiaFirst Life Insurance | 2021 – Present
Chennai, TN (Life Insurance & Financial Services | 3,500 Employees)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed as the enterprise
Salesforce Architect to lead the CRM Consolidation Initiative. Responsible
for end-to-end FSC implementation architecture and a 10-member delivery team.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• CRM Consolidation: Architected the migration of 3 legacy CRM systems to
  Salesforce FSC for 1,200+ insurance agents. Improved agent productivity
  by 45% and reduced policy servicing time from 5 days to 2 hours.
• MuleSoft Integration: Designed MuleSoft integration connecting Salesforce
  FSC with 6 core insurance systems (policy admin, claims, billing, KYC).
  Reduced manual data re-entry for agents by 92%.
• Experience Cloud Portal: Built a customer self-service portal on Experience
  Cloud for 2M+ policyholders enabling policy downloads, claim tracking, and
  premium payment, deflecting 35% of call center volume.
• CPQ Implementation: Implemented Salesforce CPQ for 15 insurance product
  lines, reducing quote generation time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes and
  improving quote accuracy to 99.6%.
• DevOps Governance: Implemented Copado-based CI/CD for all Salesforce
  deployments across 4 sandboxes, eliminating manual deployment errors
  and reducing deployment effort by 65%.


Salesforce Technical Lead | Vodafone Idea (Vi) | 2018 – 2021
Mumbai, MH (Telecommunications | 70,000 Employees)

Operational Leadership: Technical lead for Salesforce Service Cloud and
CPQ implementations supporting 350M+ subscribers and a 15,000-person
customer service operation.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Service Cloud Implementation: Led the implementation of Salesforce Service
  Cloud for 8,000 call center agents, replacing a legacy Siebel CRM. Reduced
  average handling time (AHT) from 9 minutes to 5.5 minutes.
• Omni-Channel Routing: Implemented Omni-Channel skill-based routing for
  voice, chat, email, and WhatsApp channels, improving first-contact
  resolution rate from 62% to 81%.
• Einstein Bot: Deployed a Salesforce Einstein Bot handling 40% of Tier-1
  customer queries (billing, plan info, recharge), reducing agent load by
  12,000 contacts per day.
• Custom LWC Development: Built 12 custom Lightning Web Components for
  agent desktop enhancements, reducing average clicks per transaction by 30%.


Salesforce Developer | Capgemini India | 2015 – 2018
Chennai, TN (IT Services & Consulting)

Role Overview: Salesforce developer on BFSI and retail client accounts,
delivering Sales Cloud and Service Cloud customizations.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Sales Cloud Customization: Delivered 3 end-to-end Sales Cloud implementations
  for banking clients, including custom Apex lead scoring and territory management.
• API Integration: Built REST API integrations between Salesforce and 4 external
  banking systems using Platform Events and outbound messaging.
• Automation Migration: Migrated 80+ workflow rules and process builders to
  Salesforce Flow for a major retail client, reducing technical debt.


Salesforce Administrator | Mphasis Ltd. | 2014 – 2015
Bengaluru, KA (IT Services)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Org Administration: Managed Salesforce org for 300+ internal users,
  handling profiles, roles, sharing rules, and data quality initiatives.
• Training Delivery: Conducted Salesforce end-user training for 2 new
  client go-lives, achieving 95%+ user adoption within 30 days.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Cornerstone: FSC CRM Consolidation
Role: Solution Architect | Investment: ₹6.2 Cr | Duration: 22 Months
• Objective: Replace 3 siloed legacy CRMs with a unified Salesforce FSC
  platform for 1,200 agents across 180 branches.
• Strategy: FSC for data model, MuleSoft for integration, Experience Cloud
  for customer portal, CPQ for product configuration, Copado for DevOps.
• Outcome: 45% agent productivity improvement. 35% call center deflection.
  Policy servicing time reduced by 60%.

Project Velocity: Service Cloud for Telecom
Role: Technical Lead | Objective: Modernize 15,000-agent contact center.
• Strategy: Service Cloud with Omni-Channel, CTI integration with Genesys,
  Einstein Bot for self-service, and custom LWC for agent desktop.
• Outcome: AHT reduced from 9 to 5.5 minutes. First-contact resolution
  improved by 19 percentage points. Agent satisfaction increased by 32%.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 8 Salesforce developers and admins; 5 have
  achieved Salesforce certifications. Lead monthly Salesforce CoE sessions.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partnered with business, IT, compliance,
  and vendor teams to deliver CRM solutions aligned with regulatory needs.
• Agile Delivery: Led Salesforce delivery sprints using Jira; maintained
  90%+ on-time delivery across all 22 months of the FSC program.
• CoE Leadership: Founded the company's Salesforce Center of Excellence,
  defining architecture standards, reusable component libraries, and
  governance processes adopted across all future Salesforce projects.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• Automated Smoke Testing: Built a Provar-based automated test suite for
  critical Salesforce flows, running post every deployment to catch regressions.
• Scratch Org Factory: Implemented Salesforce DX scratch org automation
  for developer environments, reducing environment setup from 2 days to
  under 30 minutes.
• Data Quality Automation: Deployed DemandTools scheduled deduplication
  jobs for Contacts and Accounts, reducing duplicate records by 88%.
• Release Notes Automation: Built a GitHub Actions workflow to auto-generate
  release notes from commit messages for every Salesforce deployment.


EDUCATION

Master of Business Administration (IT & Systems)
Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Tiruchirappalli, TN

Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
College of Engineering, Guindy (CEG), Anna University, Chennai, TN


CERTIFICATIONS

• Salesforce Certified Application Architect – Salesforce
• Salesforce Certified System Architect – Salesforce
• MuleSoft Certified Developer Level 1 – MuleSoft (Salesforce)
• Salesforce Certified CPQ Specialist – Salesforce
• Salesforce Certified Experience Cloud Consultant – Salesforce

text:
ROHAN DESAI
Senior Cybersecurity Engineer & Application Security Lead
Pune, MH • +91 95678 90123 • rohan.desai.appsec@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/rohan-desai-cybersecurity • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Driven Senior Cybersecurity Engineer and Application Security Lead with 8+
years of experience building and operating enterprise security programs across
fintech, e-commerce, and cloud-native SaaS industries. Expert in application
security, cloud security architecture, and DevSecOps pipeline integration.
Distinguished for establishing the Product Security Program at Razorpay that
embedded security into 100% of engineering squads, reducing critical
vulnerabilities in production by 74% within 12 months and enabling PCI-DSS
Level 1 certification. Proven track record of managing security operations for
platforms processing $10B+ in annual transactions and securing 500+ cloud
workloads across AWS and GCP environments.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: Security Program Strategy, Threat Modeling at Scale,
  Risk Prioritization, CISO Advisory, Security OKRs.

• Application Security: SAST, DAST, SCA, Penetration Testing, Secure Code
  Review, OWASP Top 10/API Top 10 Remediation, Bug Bounty Management.

• Cloud Security: CSPM, CWPP, Infrastructure Security Hardening, IAM Least
  Privilege, Secrets Management, Container Image Security.

• DevSecOps: Security Pipeline Integration, Shift-Left Security, Security
  Champions Program, Security-as-Code, Policy as Code (OPA).

• Threat Intelligence & Incident Response: Threat Modeling (STRIDE, PASTA),
  SIEM Management, Incident Triage, Forensics, Tabletop Exercises.

• Compliance & Risk Management: PCI-DSS (QSA Engagement), SOC 2 Type II,
  ISO 27001, RBI Cybersecurity Framework, GDPR Security Controls.

• Learning & Development: Security Champions Coaching, Developer Security
  Training (OWASP), CTF Event Organization, Security Guild Leadership.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

Application & Cloud Security Ecosystems
• SAST/DAST/SCA: Checkmarx, SonarQube, Semgrep, Veracode, OWASP ZAP,
  Burp Suite Pro, Snyk, Mend (WhiteSource), Dependabot.
• Cloud Security: Prisma Cloud, AWS Security Hub, GuardDuty, Macie, Config,
  GCP Security Command Center, Wiz, Orca Security, CloudSploit.
• Container Security: Trivy, Anchore, Aqua Security, Falco, Kube-bench,
  Open Policy Agent (OPA), Gatekeeper.

Security Operations & Testing
• Penetration Testing: Burp Suite Pro, Metasploit, Nmap, Nessus, Nuclei,
  SQLMap, OWASP ZAP, custom Python exploit scripts.
• SIEM & Monitoring: Splunk SIEM, Elastic SIEM, AWS CloudTrail, Datadog
  Security Monitoring, PagerDuty, Chronicle (GCP).
• Identity & Secrets: HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, Okta, CyberArk,
  AWS IAM Analyzer, Google Cloud IAM.
• Languages: Python (security automation), Bash, Go (security tooling), SQL.


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Application Security Engineer | Razorpay | 2021 – Present
Bengaluru, KA (Payments & Fintech Platform | 3,000 Employees)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed to build Razorpay's
Product Security Program from the ground up. Responsible for application
security tooling, Security Champions Program, and cloud security across
a platform processing $10B+ in annual transactions.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Product Security Program: Established a Security Champions Program with
  50 engineers across 15 squads. Reduced critical vulnerabilities reaching
  production by 74% within 12 months.
• PCI-DSS Level 1 Certification: Led all technical controls for PCI-DSS
  Level 1 certification covering the payment processing infrastructure.
  Achieved certification first attempt with zero major findings.
• DevSecOps Pipeline: Integrated Semgrep (SAST), Snyk (SCA), and OWASP
  ZAP (DAST) into all GitHub Actions CI pipelines. Security scan coverage
  increased from 18% to 100% of pull requests.
• Bug Bounty Program: Launched and managed the Razorpay Bug Bounty
  Program on HackerOne. Triaged 800+ reports, resolving 120 valid
  vulnerabilities before they could be exploited.
• Cloud Security Posture: Deployed Wiz for CSPM across 400+ AWS and GCP
  workloads. Reduced critical cloud misconfigurations from 180 to 12 in
  90 days.


Security Engineer | Flipkart (Walmart Group) | 2018 – 2021
Bengaluru, KA (E-Commerce | 30,000 Employees)

Operational Leadership: Core security engineer on the Application and
Infrastructure Security team, protecting a platform serving 300M+ registered
customers during peak sale events processing 1M+ orders per hour.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Sale Event Security: Led pre-Big Billion Days security readiness assessments
  covering 200+ APIs and 50+ microservices. Zero security incidents during
  3 consecutive major sale events.
• WAF Implementation: Deployed and tuned AWS WAF rules protecting all
  public-facing APIs. Blocked 50M+ malicious requests per month while
  maintaining less than 0.01% false positive rate.
• Secrets Management: Implemented HashiCorp Vault for dynamic secrets
  across 300+ microservices, eliminating hard-coded credentials. Passed
  PCI penetration test with zero high/critical findings.
• Security Automation: Built a Python-based security automation framework
  for automated vulnerability triage and Jira ticket creation, reducing
  mean time to assign vulnerabilities by 85%.


Security Analyst | Wipro Cybersecurity Practice | 2015 – 2018
Pune, MH (IT Services & Consulting)

Role Overview: Security analyst on client penetration testing and security
assessment engagements across banking, government, and retail sectors.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Penetration Testing: Conducted 30+ web application and API penetration
  tests for banking and retail clients, identifying critical vulnerabilities
  including SQL injection, IDOR, and broken authentication.
• Red Team Exercise: Participated in a 3-month red team exercise for a
  major public sector bank, gaining initial foothold via phishing and
  escalating to domain admin. Findings drove 15 critical remediation items.
• Client Training: Delivered OWASP-based secure coding training to 200+
  developers across 4 client organizations.


Junior Security Analyst | Quick Heal Technologies | 2014 – 2015
Pune, MH (Cybersecurity Products)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Malware Analysis: Analyzed 200+ malware samples weekly, contributing
  threat signatures to Quick Heal's threat intelligence database.
• SIEM Monitoring: Monitored SIEM alerts for managed security service
  clients, handling L1 incident triage and escalation.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Shield: Product Security Program
Role: Program Lead | Investment: ₹2.2 Cr | Duration: 12 Months
• Objective: Embed security into 15 engineering squads via a Security
  Champions Program, automated tooling, and developer training.
• Strategy: Semgrep for SAST, Snyk for SCA, ZAP for DAST in CI, HackerOne
  for bug bounty, Wiz for cloud security, custom threat modeling templates.
• Outcome: 74% reduction in production critical vulnerabilities. 100% PR
  security scan coverage. PCI-DSS Level 1 certified.

Project Fortress: Pre-Sale Security Hardening
Role: Security Lead | Objective: Zero security incidents during peak sale events.
• Strategy: Full API security review, load testing with security scenarios,
  WAF rule tuning, secrets rotation, and tabletop incident exercises.
• Outcome: Zero security incidents across 3 Big Billion Days events handling
  1M+ orders/hour. WAF blocked 50M+ malicious requests per month.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 6 junior security engineers; 3 achieved
  CEH or OSCP certifications. Run monthly security guild sessions.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partnered with engineering, DevOps, legal,
  and compliance to embed security across all product and infrastructure work.
• Agile Delivery: Managed security backlog in Jira, delivering 88% of
  planned security initiatives across 4 half-year planning cycles.
• Security Culture: Ran quarterly developer security training reaching 500+
  engineers, with pre/post assessments showing 40% knowledge improvement.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• Automated Triage Bot: Built a Python bot integrating HackerOne, Jira,
  and Slack for automated vulnerability triage and assignment, saving 15
  hours of manual triage per week.
• Threat Model as Code: Implemented pytm (Python Threat Modeling) for
  automated threat model generation from architecture diagrams.
• Compliance Evidence Automation: Built scripts to auto-collect PCI-DSS
  evidence from AWS Config, CloudTrail, and GitHub, reducing audit
  preparation effort from 6 weeks to 5 days.
• Daily Attack Surface Scan: Deployed Nuclei-based automated scanning of
  all public endpoints daily, identifying new exposures within 24 hours
  of deployment.


EDUCATION

Master of Technology in Information Security
Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Bombay, Mumbai, MH

Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
Pune Institute of Computer Technology (PICT), Pune, MH


CERTIFICATIONS

• Offensive Security Certified Professional (OSCP) – Offensive Security
• Certified Cloud Security Professional (CCSP) – ISC2
• AWS Certified Security – Specialty
• Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) – EC-Council
• GIAC Web Application Penetration Tester (GWAPT) – GIAC
