text:
MEERA VENKATARAMAN
Senior SAP Consultant & ERP Solutions Architect
Bengaluru, KA • +91 97890 12345 • meera.venkat.sap@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/meera-venkataraman-sap • Indian Citizen


PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Accomplished Senior SAP Consultant and ERP Solutions Architect with 10+ years
of experience delivering large-scale SAP implementations and transformations
across automotive, heavy manufacturing, and consumer goods industries. Expert
in SAP S/4HANA Finance (FI/CO), Materials Management (MM), and Supply Chain
(SD/PP/WM) with deep specialization in Brownfield and Greenfield migrations.
Distinguished for leading the SAP S/4HANA Migration Program at Mahindra CIE
Automotive that consolidated 4 legacy SAP ECC systems into a single S/4HANA
instance, reducing month-end close time from 8 days to 2 days and saving
$3.1M in annual licensing and support costs. Proven track record of delivering
10+ full-cycle SAP implementations across 8 countries.


CORE COMPETENCIES

• Strategic Leadership: SAP Program Management, Solution Architecture,
  Fit-Gap Analysis, Executive Steering Committees, Global Rollout Strategy.

• SAP Finance & Controlling: FI (GL, AR, AP, Asset Accounting, Bank Accounting),
  CO (CCA, PCA, Internal Orders, Product Costing, COPA), S/4HANA Finance.

• SAP Supply Chain & Logistics: MM (Procurement, Inventory), SD (Order-to-Cash),
  PP (Production Planning), WM/EWM (Warehouse Management), LE (Logistics).

• SAP Integration & Technology: SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform),
  SAP Integration Suite, ALE/IDOC, BAPI, RFC, SAP Fiori/UI5.

• Data Migration & Cutover: SAP Data Migration Cockpit, LSMW, BODS,
  S/4HANA Migration Object Modeler, Cutover Planning & Execution.

• Compliance & Risk Management: SAP GRC (Access Control, Risk Management),
  SOX Internal Controls, GDPR for ERP Data, Audit Readiness.

• Learning & Development: SAP Super User Training Programs, Key User
  Workshops, SAP Enable Now Content Creation, Mentoring Junior Consultants.


TECHNICAL SKILLS

SAP Platform Ecosystems
• Core Modules: FI, CO, MM, SD, PP, WM/EWM, PM (Plant Maintenance),
  QM (Quality Management), PS (Project Systems), HR (HCM basics).
• S/4HANA: S/4HANA Finance, Universal Journal, New Asset Accounting,
  Embedded Analytics, Fiori Launchpad, Central Finance (CFIN).
• SAP Technology: SAP BTP, SAP Integration Suite (CPI), SAP Analytics Cloud
  (SAC), SAP Datasphere, SAP Fiori/UI5, SAP Enable Now.

Integration & Development
• Integration: SAP Integration Suite (CPI/HCI), ALE, IDOC, BAPI, RFC,
  REST/SOAP web services, Dell Boomi, MuleSoft (SAP adapter).
• Development: ABAP (report reading & debugging), SAP Script, SmartForms,
  Adobe Forms, BRF+, Enhancement Framework.
• Data Migration: SAP Data Migration Cockpit, LSMW, BODS, LTMC, LTMOM.

Analytics & Reporting
• SAP Reporting: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), SAP Datasphere, Embedded
  Analytics (CDS Views), SAP BW/4HANA basics, Fiori Analytical Apps.
• External BI: Power BI connected via SAP OData, Tableau, SAP Crystal Reports.


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior SAP S/4HANA Consultant | Mahindra CIE Automotive | 2021 – Present
Pune, MH (Automotive Components Manufacturing | 8,000 Employees)

Strategic Mandate & Technical Oversight: Appointed as the solution architect
and functional lead for the SAP S/4HANA Migration Program. Responsible for
FI/CO/MM/PP workstream design and leading a 14-member consultant team across
4 plant locations.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• S/4HANA Migration: Led the Brownfield migration of 4 legacy SAP ECC 6.0
  systems to a single SAP S/4HANA 2021 instance. Reduced month-end close
  from 8 days to 2 days and saved $3.1M annually in licensing costs.
• Universal Journal Adoption: Redesigned the chart of accounts and cost
  element structure leveraging S/4HANA Universal Journal, eliminating
  reconciliation between FI and CO and reducing period-end effort by 55%.
• Embedded Analytics: Built 25 SAP Fiori Analytical Apps replacing legacy
  Crystal Reports. Finance team reduced report preparation time by 70%.
• Integration Design: Architected SAP Integration Suite (CPI) flows
  connecting S/4HANA with 4 third-party systems (MES, PLM, Dealer Portal,
  Banking), replacing 12 legacy IDOC-based interfaces.
• Data Migration: Managed the migration of 5M+ master data and transactional
  records using SAP Data Migration Cockpit. Achieved 99.7% data accuracy
  validated by business owners before go-live.


SAP Functional Consultant (FI/CO/MM) | Tata Technologies | 2018 – 2021
Pune, MH (Engineering Services & IT for Manufacturing | 10,000 Employees)

Operational Leadership: Delivered SAP FI/CO and MM implementations for
automotive OEM and tier-1 supplier clients across India, UK, and Germany.

Key Measurable Achievements:

• Global SAP Rollout: Led the SAP template rollout to 3 international plants
  (UK, Germany, Thailand) for a Tier-1 automotive client, delivering all 3
  go-lives on time and within budget.
• Product Costing Implementation: Designed the SAP CO-PC (Product Costing)
  solution for a complex multi-level BOM manufacturing environment, enabling
  accurate standard cost estimates for 10,000+ finished goods.
• Procure-to-Pay Optimization: Redesigned the SAP MM Procure-to-Pay process
  with 3-way match and GR-based invoice verification, reducing payment
  disputes by 60% and improving supplier satisfaction scores.
• FICO Integration: Designed automatic account determination for 18 business
  processes, eliminating manual journal entries that previously required
  2 FTE accountants.


SAP FI/CO Consultant | Infosys SAP Practice | 2015 – 2018
Bengaluru, KA (IT Services & Consulting)

Role Overview: SAP FI/CO consultant on end-to-end implementation and
support projects for FMCG and discrete manufacturing clients.

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Greenfield Implementation: Delivered full SAP FI/CO implementation for
  a mid-size FMCG company (1,500 users), replacing a legacy Tally ERP.
  Go-live achieved on schedule with 96% user adoption within 30 days.
• Year-End Close Acceleration: Redesigned the FI year-end close process
  for a manufacturing client, reducing close time from 12 days to 5 days.
• Support Optimization: Reduced open FI/CO support tickets from 120/month
  to 30/month by root-cause fixing 15 recurring configuration issues.


SAP Junior Consultant | L&T Infotech (LTIMindtree) | 2014 – 2015
Mumbai, MH (IT Services)

Key Measurable Achievements:
• Configuration Support: Configured SAP FI enterprise structure, GL accounts,
  and payment terms for a new company code rollout.
• User Training: Delivered end-user SAP FI training to 80+ finance users
  across 2 go-live events, achieving 94% training completion rate.


KEY PROJECTS PORTFOLIO

Project Apex: SAP S/4HANA Consolidation
Role: Solution Architect | Investment: ₹9.5 Cr | Duration: 26 Months
• Objective: Consolidate 4 ECC systems into a single S/4HANA instance for
  8,000 employees across 4 manufacturing plants and a corporate HQ.
• Strategy: Brownfield system conversion with selective data migration, SAP
  Integration Suite for external interfaces, and SAP Enable Now for training.
• Outcome: Month-end close reduced by 75%. $3.1M annual cost saving.
  99.7% data migration accuracy. Zero Severity-1 incidents in first 6 months.

Project Atlas: Global SAP Template Rollout
Role: Functional Lead | Objective: Roll out SAP template to 3 international plants.
• Strategy: Localized core template for UK GAAP, German HGB, and Thai tax
  requirements while maintaining global process standardization.
• Outcome: All 3 go-lives on time. Tax compliance audit passed in all 3
  countries within 6 months of go-live.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM MANAGEMENT

• Mentorship & Growth: Mentored 7 junior SAP consultants; 4 have achieved
  SAP certifications. Lead monthly SAP Community of Practice sessions.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Coordinated with finance, procurement,
  manufacturing, IT, and external auditors to design compliant SAP solutions.
• Agile Delivery: Managed SAP project workstream using SAP Activate
  methodology; maintained on-time milestone delivery across all 26 months.
• Training Leadership: Designed and delivered SAP Super User training
  programs for 200+ end users across 3 go-live events.


PROCESS IMPROVEMENTS & AUTOMATION

• Automated Reconciliation: Built SAP FI reconciliation reports using CDS
  Views and Fiori Analytical Apps, replacing 5 manual Excel reconciliation
  processes performed daily by the finance team.
• IDOC Error Handling: Implemented automated IDOC monitoring and
  re-processing using a custom ABAP report, reducing manual IDOC error
  resolution from 3 hours daily to under 20 minutes.
• Month-End Checklist Automation: Built a SAP Fiori app replacing an Excel-
  based month-end checklist, giving the CFO real-time visibility into close
  status across all 4 plants simultaneously.
• Vendor Master Governance: Implemented SAP MDG (Master Data Governance)
  for vendor master, reducing duplicate vendor records by 91% and improving
  payment accuracy.


EDUCATION

Master of Business Administration (Finance & Operations)
Xavier Institute of Management (XIMB), Bhubaneswar, OD

Bachelor of Commerce (Accounting & Finance)
Loyola College, Chennai, TN (University of Madras)


CERTIFICATIONS

• SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP S/4HANA Finance (SAP)
